examples.en: The case does not merit further investigation.
examples.zh: 这个案子不值得进一步调查。

examples.en: They had made a verbal agreement to sell.
examples.zh: 他们达成了口头售货协定。

examples.en: They received a verbal offer to buy the company lock, stock and barrel.
examples.zh: 他们收到全盘收购公司的口头承诺。

examples.en: Our solicitor holds our wills.
examples.zh: 律师保存着我们的遗嘱。

examples.en: My solicitor is no longer in practice.
examples.zh: 我的律师已不再执业了。

examples.en: Diamonds have little intrinsic value and their price depends almost entirely on their scarcity.
examples.zh: 钻石没有多少内在价值，它们的价格几乎完全取决于其稀有程度。

examples.en: It's got extrinsic and intrinsic value for me.
examples.zh: 对我来说，它有外在和内在的价值。

examples.en: He became aware of the proximity of the Afghans.
examples.zh: 他开始意识到那些阿富汗人的接近。

examples.en: As proximity increases, so does understanding.
examples.zh: 随着不断接近，理解也在增加。

examples.en: The luminous dial on the clock showed five minutes to seven.
examples.zh: 发光的表盘上显示6：55。

examples.en: Encompassed in a luminous cloud, of which he was now merely the fiery heart, he swung through unthinkable arcs of oscillation, like a vast pendulum.
examples.zh: 他现在只不过是一颗火热的心，被一团发光的云所包围，他像一个巨大的钟摆一样，在不可思议的摆动的弧线上摇摆。

examples.en: She went quiet for a moment while she summoned up the words to lash him.
examples.zh: 她沉默了一会儿，想了些话来怒斥他。

examples.en: They could lash out.
examples.zh: 他们可以猛烈抨击。

examples.en: Can I have a receipt, please?
examples.zh: 请给我开个收据，好吗？

examples.en: I wrote her a receipt for the money.
examples.zh: 我为那笔钱给她开了张收据。

examples.en: We were wrong to assume she'd agree.
examples.zh: 我们错误地以为她会同意。

examples.en: We were wrong to assume that she'd agree.
examples.zh: 我们错误地以为她会同意。

examples.en: Everything in the world is so. When the conditions of time and space and others predestine to come together, a thing happens.
examples.zh: 世间的万事万物也是这样，时空等条件因缘际会地凑合在一起，一件事就发生了。

examples.en: Listen and chant again.
examples.zh: 听并再唱一遍。

examples.en: Let's learn the chant.
examples.zh: 让我们学唱圣歌吧。

examples.en: Her destiny was entwined with his.
examples.zh: 她与他的命运紧密相联。

examples.en: We are masters of our own destiny.
examples.zh: 我们是自己命运的主人。

examples.en: You are asked to swallow a capsule containing vitamin B.
examples.zh: 你被要求吞下一颗含维生素B的胶囊。

examples.en: A Russian space capsule is currently orbiting the Earth.
examples.zh: 一个俄罗斯太空舱目前正环绕地球飞行。

examples.en: Ten years on, the original concept was wearing well.
examples.zh: 十年过去，最初的观念依然适用。

examples.en: The concept of saturation marketing makes perfect sense.
examples.zh: 饱和营销的概念很有道理。

examples.en: The more pesticides are used, the more resistant the insects become so the more pesticides have to be used. It's a vicious circle.
examples.zh: 杀虫剂使用得越多，那些昆虫的抵抗力越强，因此就要使用更多的杀虫剂。这是一个恶性循环。

examples.en: Paint the shed with weather-resistant paint.
examples.zh: 用抗风雨的油漆把棚子漆一漆。

examples.en: Ozone is a highly reactive form of oxygen gas.
examples.zh: 臭氧是一种高度活跃的氧气形态。

examples.en: The ozone layer screens out dangerous rays from the sun.
examples.zh: 臭氧层能遮挡住来自太阳的有害射线。

examples.en: The trial was adjourned for an indefinite period.
examples.zh: 审判被无限期推迟。

examples.en: They seem determined to string the talks out for an indefinite period.
examples.zh: 他们好像一心要把谈判无限期地拖下去。

examples.en: A disaster was narrowly averted.
examples.zh: 及时防止了一场灾难。

examples.en: Warnings of disaster may be overblown.
examples.zh: 灾难的警告可能是夸张的。

examples.en: Oil pollution could damage the fragile ecology of the coral reefs.
examples.zh: 石油污染可能破坏珊瑚礁脆弱的生态环境。

examples.en: Development has been guided by a concern for the ecology of the area.
examples.zh: 关注本地区的生态状况一直是发展的指导原则。

examples.en: The work was carried out at minimal cost.
examples.zh: 这项工作是以最少的开销完成的。

examples.en: The cooperation between the two is minimal.
examples.zh: 两者之间的合作是最低程度的。

examples.en: Why don't you mix a cocktail for our guests?
examples.zh: 你给客人调制鸡尾酒好吗？

examples.en: On arrival, guests are offered wine or a champagne cocktail.
examples.zh: 到达时，客人们可以享用葡萄酒或一份香槟鸡尾酒。

examples.en: This is an opportunity to enhance the reputation of the company.
examples.zh: 这是提高公司声誉的机会。

examples.en: The White House is eager to protect and enhance that reputation.
examples.zh: 白宫急于保护并提高那声望。

examples.en: The convention does not apply to us.
examples.zh: 该协定对我们不适用。

examples.en: By convention the deputy leader was always a woman.
examples.zh: 按惯例，这一领导职务的副职总是由女性担任。

examples.en: The disease has no known cure.
examples.zh: 这种病目前还是不治之症。

examples.en: Disease often goes with poverty.
examples.zh: 疾病与贫穷常常相伴而生。

examples.en: Calcium is found most abundantly in milk.
examples.zh: 奶含钙最丰富。

examples.en: Calcium may aid in the prevention of colon cancer.
examples.zh: 钙可能有助于预防结肠癌。

examples.en: The bad weather notwithstanding, the event was a great success.
examples.zh: 尽管天气恶劣，活动还是取得了巨大的成功。

examples.en: He despised William Pitt, notwithstanding the similar views they both held.
examples.zh: 他瞧不起威廉·皮特，尽管他们俩所持有的观点相似。

examples.en: Suspicion kindled within her.
examples.zh: 她渐渐产生了怀疑。

examples.en: She viewed him with suspicion.
examples.zh: 她以怀疑的目光看待他。

examples.en: When her deal is done, the client emerges with her purchase.
examples.zh: 交易完成后，顾客拿着购买的东西出来了。

examples.en: It was decided (that) the school should purchase new software.
examples.zh: 已经决定学校要购买新软件。

examples.en: Her answer amounted to a complete refusal.
examples.zh: 她的答复等于完全拒绝。

examples.en: His refusal to talk was simple stubbornness.
examples.zh: 他拒绝交谈只是出于固执。

examples.en: Gerald had little disposable income.
examples.zh: 杰拉尔德没有多少可自由支配的收入。

examples.en: Disposable diapers are fairly straightforward to put on.
examples.zh: 一次性尿布非常容易穿。

examples.en: He had survived heart bypass surgery.
examples.zh: 他在心脏搭桥手术中活了下来。

examples.en: Traffic in the town has dropped off since the bypass opened.
examples.zh: 这条旁道通车后，城里来往的车辆就减少了。

examples.en: The new chip will be made from a piece of silicon about the size of a postage stamp.
examples.zh: 这种新的芯片将由大约邮票大小的一块硅片制成。

examples.en: Stanford and Berkeley yielded Silicon Valley.
examples.zh: 斯坦福和伯克利造就了硅谷。

examples.en: It was a model of clarity.
examples.zh: 这是表达清晰的范例。

examples.en: For all its clarity of style, the book is not easy reading.
examples.zh: 这本书虽然文体清晰，但读起来并不容易。

examples.en: The fund is voluntarily administered.
examples.zh: 这个基金是无偿管理的。

examples.en: He plans to recapitalize the insurance fund.
examples.zh: 他计划调整保险基金的资本结构。

examples.en: This is your typical English pub.
examples.zh: 这就是典型的英格兰酒吧。

examples.en: It was typical family entertainment.
examples.zh: 这是典型的家庭娱乐活动。

examples.en: If you are submitting your resume in English, find out if the recipient uses British English or American English because there are variations between the two versions.
examples.zh: 如果你要提交英文简历，要弄清楚收件人使用的是英式英语还是美式英语，因为两者是有区别的。

examples.en: With so many ways to communicate, how should a manager choose the one that's best—particularly when the message to be delivered is bad or unwelcome news for the recipient?
examples.zh: 有如此丰富的沟通方式，经理应该如何选择最好的方式——特别是当你要传递的消息对接收者来说是坏消息或是不受欢迎的消息时？

examples.en: The prime minister of Fiji has said Fiji is in no hurry to rejoin the Commonwealth.
examples.zh: 斐济总理称斐济并不急于重返英联邦。

examples.en: Britain has announced that it is to cancel about 200 million pounds' worth of debts owed to it by poorer Commonwealth countries.
examples.zh: 英国宣布将免除英联邦内较为贫穷的国家欠下的约2亿英镑债务。

examples.en: Two people who have divergent views on this question are George Watt and Bob Marr.
examples.zh: 在这个问题上意见相左的两个人是乔治·瓦特和鲍勃·马尔。

examples.en: His biographies of James Watt, Richard Arkwright and Josiah Wedgwood were held up as beacons to guide the working man through his difficult life.
examples.zh: 他写的关于詹姆斯·瓦特、理查德·阿克赖特和约西亚·韦奇伍德的传记被奉为是指引工人们度过艰难生活的灯塔。

examples.en: I'll give you a buzz on Monday, OK?
examples.zh: 我星期一给你打电话行吗？

examples.en: Flying gives me a real buzz.
examples.zh: 飞行真让我兴奋。

examples.en: Finance is Mark's area.
examples.zh: 财务是马克负责的范围。

examples.en: There remains the problem of finance.
examples.zh: 财政问题仍然存在。

examples.en: Contractors who fall behind schedule incur heavy financial penalties.
examples.zh: 承包商如延误工期将被处以巨额罚款。

examples.en: The strategic regulation of evening body reserves is also likely to incur additional costs, as nightingales must spend more time foraging in order to build up larger body reserves.
examples.zh: 晚间的身体储能的策略管理机制，也会产生额外的能量支出，这样夜莺就必须花更多时间找食物，来增加储能。

examples.en: His short temper had become notorious.
examples.zh: 他的急性子已臭名远扬。

examples.en: He is a notorious guy in many girls' eyes.
examples.zh: 在许多女孩子眼里，他是个臭名昭著的家伙。

examples.en: She would like an investigation into the assassination of her husband.
examples.zh: 她想要对其丈夫的遇刺进行调查。

examples.en: They are already serving prison sentences for their part in the assassination.
examples.zh: 他们已经因为参与暗杀而在监狱服刑。

examples.en: There was an infant squalling in the back of the church.
examples.zh: 教堂的后面有个婴儿大声啼哭的声音。

examples.en: The nation's infant mortality rate has reached a record low.
examples.zh: 该国的婴儿死亡率已达历史最低。

examples.en: Located near the base of the neck, the thyroid is a large endocrine gland that produces hormones that help control growth and metabolism.
examples.zh: 甲状腺位于颈部的底部附近，是一个很大的内分泌腺体，它产生激素，协助控制生长和新陈代谢。

examples.en: It is thought that being overweight may also increase the risk of cancer in the reproductive organs for women and in the prostate gland for men.
examples.zh: 人们认为，超重还可能增加女性生殖器官和男性前列腺患癌的风险。

examples.en: The premise is that schools will work harder to improve if they must compete.
examples.zh: 前提是各学校如必须竞争就会更加努力改进。

examples.en: His reasoning is based on the premise that all people are equally capable of good and evil.
examples.zh: 他的推理是以人可以为善亦可以为恶为前提的。

examples.en: My dad took me to the circus.
examples.zh: 我爸爸带我去看马戏。

examples.en: We took the children to the circus.
examples.zh: 我们带孩子去看了马戏表演。

examples.en: Immigration is a controversial issue in many countries.
examples.zh: 移民在很多国家都是一个有争议的问题。

examples.en: The distinction between craft and fine art is more controversial.
examples.zh: 工艺和美术之间的区别更有争议。

examples.en: Students with high hope set themselves higher goals and know how to work to attain them.
examples.zh: 被寄予厚望的学生为自己设定更高的目标，并知道如何努力实现这些目标。

examples.en: Thus they are not able to "experience life" and so they attain a high life span in captivity.
examples.zh: 因此，他们不能“体验生活”，从而在囚禁中获得了较长的寿命。

examples.en: To deprive the boy of his education is a violation of state law.
examples.zh: 剥夺这个男孩的受教育权是一种违反州法律的行为。

examples.en: It may deprive a team of business opportunities.
examples.zh: 它可能会剥夺一个团队的商业机会。

examples.en: The decorating was done by a previous tenant.
examples.zh: 装修是一位前房客搞的。

examples.en: The rent is a matter for negotiation between the landlord and the tenant.
examples.zh: 租金可以由房东和租户协商确定。

examples.en: This raises the specter of director over-commitment and the resultant dilution of contribution.
examples.zh: 这引发了董事过度承诺以及由此导致的出资额稀释的担忧。

examples.en: All the resultant activities have tended, on balance, to reduce tree cover and increase grassland.
examples.zh: 总的来说，所有由此产生的活动都趋向于减少树木覆盖，增加草地。

examples.en: There is no pest here.
examples.zh: 这里没有害虫。

examples.en: This is almost a pest-control service.
examples.zh: 这几乎是一项虫害防治服务。

examples.en: The brake pedal had just snapped off.
examples.zh: 制动踏板刚才突然断裂了。

examples.en: The pedal had sheared off at the pivot.
examples.zh: 这个踏板已经在轴处断裂。

examples.en: The batter rises as it bakes.
examples.zh: 面糊烘烤时膨胀。

examples.en: Mix the batter and let it stand for twenty minutes.
examples.zh: 搅好面糊以后，放上二十分钟。

examples.en: They take great pride in their heritage.
examples.zh: 他们为自己的传统感到十分自豪。

examples.en: The building is part of our national heritage.
examples.zh: 这个建筑是我们民族遗产的一部分。

examples.en: They took their appeal to the Supreme Court.
examples.zh: 他们上诉到了最高法院。

examples.en: The verdict was overruled by the Supreme Court.
examples.zh: 最高法院驳回了那个裁决。

examples.en: There was none of the drama and relief of a hostage release.
examples.zh: 丝毫没有人质释放的戏剧性场面和放松。

examples.en: He must be treated as a hostage of high rank, not as a common prisoner.
examples.zh: 他一定要作为一个高级人质而不是一般囚徒来对待。

examples.en: Club members will be given priority.
examples.zh: 俱乐部成员享有优先权。

examples.en: Buses have priority at this junction.
examples.zh: 在这个路口，公共汽车有优先通行权。

examples.en: The town is built on a slope.
examples.zh: 这座城建在斜坡上。

examples.en: After a mile, the slope steepened.
examples.zh: 过了一英里后，山坡变陡了。

examples.en: By selecting a group of suitable entrance parameters, a submerged inlet with the trapezoid entrance on the plane surface is designed and verified.
examples.zh: 通过选取一组合适的入口参数，设计了一种在平面上具有梯形入口的水下入口，并进行了验证。

examples.en: TC1 is mounted directly on the pump inlet tee replacing the convectron gauge shown on the diagram.
examples.zh: TC1直接安装在泵进口三通上，取代图中所示的对流管压力表。

examples.en: There was a metallic click and the gates swung open.
examples.zh: 一声金属碰撞的咔嗒声后，大门打开了。

examples.en: He had painted all the wood with metallic silver paint.
examples.zh: 他把所有木料涂上了有金属光泽的银漆。

examples.en: The space shuttle Atlantis returned safely to Earth today.
examples.zh: 亚特兰蒂斯号航天飞机今天安全返回地球。

examples.en: The countdown has begun for the launch of the space shuttle.
examples.zh: 航天飞机发射前的倒计时已经开始。

examples.en: Once destroyed, brain cells do not regenerate.
examples.zh: 脑细胞一旦遭到破坏，就不能再生。

examples.en: Nerve cells have limited ability to regenerate if destroyed.
examples.zh: 神经细胞如果被破坏其再生能力有限。

examples.en: The effect is caused by the way we allocate our attention.
examples.zh: 这种效应是由我们分配注意力的方式引起的。

examples.en: The effect is caused by the way we allocate our attention.
examples.zh: 这种效应是由我们分配注意力的方式引起的。

examples.en: These children have a huge reserve of latent talent.
examples.zh: 这些孩子蕴藏着极大的潜在天赋。

examples.en: Advertisements attempt to project a latent meaning behind an overt message.
examples.zh: 广告试图传达一种隐藏在公开信息里的潜在意义。

examples.en: I am completely energized and feeling terrific.
examples.zh: 我现在充满了活力，感觉棒极了。

examples.en: I feel absolutely terrific today!
examples.zh: 我今天的感觉真是好极了！

examples.en: From a medical standpoint a week is usually not a consequential delay.
examples.zh: 从医学观点看，一周通常不被视为是严重的拖延。

examples.en: He believes that from a military standpoint, the situation is under control.
examples.zh: 他认为从军事角度来看，局势已得到控制。

examples.en: We turn now to our primary question.
examples.zh: 我们现在转到我们的主要问题上。

examples.en: Computers are now commonplace in primary classrooms.
examples.zh: 计算机如今在小学教室里很普遍。

examples.en: Ed played at being a pirate.
examples.zh: 埃德假扮海盗。

examples.en: Pirate copies of the DVD are already being sold.
examples.zh: 该DVD的盗版已经有售了。

examples.en: Mick was stubborn and domineering with a very bad temper.
examples.zh: 麦克既固执又刚愎自用，脾气还很坏。

examples.en: The more Sarah nagged her, the more stubborn Cissie became.
examples.zh: 萨拉越是对她唠叨不休，茜茜就越是固执。

examples.en: Governments need to formulate energy policies that promote economically and environmentally sound development.
examples.zh: 各国政府需要制订促进经济和环境充分发展的能源政策。

examples.en: Computers increasingly become principal actors in leveraging data to formulate questions, which requires radically new ways of reasoning.
examples.zh: 计算机日益成为利用数据来制定问题的主要角色，而这需要全新的推理方法。

examples.en: Many people are unaware of just how much food and drink they consume.
examples.zh: 许多人不知道自己到底消耗掉多少食物和饮料。

examples.en: Some of the most efficient refrigerators consume 70 percent less electricity than traditional models.
examples.zh: 一些能效最高的冰箱比传统型号少消耗70%的电。

examples.en: The dome is 42.3 metres in diameter.
examples.zh: 这个穹顶直径为42.3米。

examples.en: The shelter is built by lashing poles together to form a small dome.
examples.zh: 该掩蔽处是把杆子捆到一起形成一个小圆顶而搭建成。

examples.en: A thin layer of dust covered everything.
examples.zh: 所有的物品上都积了薄薄的一层灰尘。

examples.en: Teeth have a hard surface layer called enamel.
examples.zh: 牙齿有一层叫做釉质的坚硬表层。

examples.en: Such an attitude is alien to most businessmen.
examples.zh: 这种态度对大多数商人都很陌生。

examples.en: In a world that had suddenly become alien and dangerous, he was her only security.
examples.zh: 在一个突然变得陌生而危险的世界里，他是她唯一的守护神。

examples.en: Many people have testified to his competence.
examples.zh: 很多人已证实了他的能力。

examples.en: The judge has to act within the competence of the court.
examples.zh: 法官必须在法庭的权限范围内行使权力。

examples.en: Changing a fuse is one of those fiddly jobs I hate.
examples.zh: 换保险丝是我不愿干的麻烦事之一。

examples.en: I paid $80 to have my car radio fixed and I bet all they did was change a fuse.
examples.zh: 我付了$80修车里的收音机，我敢断定他们只是换了根保险丝。

examples.en: Power is largely concentrated in the hands of a small elite.
examples.zh: 权力主要集中在少数精英人物的手里。

examples.en: Except for elite schools, admission standards are low.
examples.zh: 除了精英学校，其他学校的入学标准都很低。

examples.en: Shares are selling at a premium.
examples.zh: 这种股票以高于面值的价格出售。

examples.en: Space is at a premium in a one-bedroomed apartment.
examples.zh: 单居室公寓的空间是很有限的。

examples.en: Yes; then something better, something still grander, will surely follow, or wherefore should they thus ornament me?
examples.zh: 是的；然后一定会有更好的，更美的事情到来，不然他们为什么要这样装饰我呢？

examples.en: A nice scented sachet is not just an ornament, but more of something that contains cultural and historical richness.
examples.zh: 一个漂亮的香囊不仅是装饰品，还含有丰富的文化和历史内涵。

examples.en: She's perfectly safe, I can assure you.
examples.zh: 我可以向你保证，她绝对安全。

examples.en: Victory would assure a place in the finals.
examples.zh: 胜利将确保能参加决赛。

examples.en: He left the party early on the pretext of having to work.
examples.zh: 他借口有事要处理，早早离开了聚会。

examples.en: He left the party early on the pretext of having work to do.
examples.zh: 他借口有事要处理，早早离开了聚会。

examples.en: He showed him how to blow into the ivory mouthpiece.
examples.zh: 他给他演示了如何把气吹进象牙吹口。

examples.en: They don't really, in their ivory towers, understand how pernicious drug crime is.
examples.zh: 身处象牙塔里，他们并不真正懂得毒品犯罪多么有害。

examples.en: Race is a recurrent theme in the work.
examples.zh: 种族是该作品中反复出现的一个主题。

examples.en: The speaker was now warming to her theme.
examples.zh: 演讲者就她的主题越讲越起劲。

examples.en: He needed to consult with an attorney.
examples.zh: 他需要和律师咨询。

examples.en: Consult your doctor about how much exercise you should get.
examples.zh: 咨询你的医生你应做多少运动。

examples.en: There was a degree of solidarity and sisterhood among the women.
examples.zh: 这些女人之间具有一定程度的团结精神和姐妹情谊。

examples.en: The solidarity among China's various nationalities is as firm as a rock.
examples.zh: 中国各族人民之间的团结坚如磐石。

examples.en: Babies tumble when they are learning to walk.
examples.zh: 幼儿在学走路时常常跌倒。

examples.en: He enjoys rough-and-tumble play.
examples.zh: 他喜欢吵闹式的玩耍。

examples.en: She is a lovely and gracious woman.
examples.zh: 她是个可爱而和蔼的女人。

examples.en: She closed with a gracious speech of thanks.
examples.zh: 她以彬彬有礼的致谢辞作结。

examples.en: They did not need to smash paint and canvas; they went beyond this to smash the whole continuity of logical thought.
examples.zh: 他们不需要打碎颜料和画布；他们超越了这一点，打碎了整个逻辑思维的连续性。

examples.en: We had to smash the door open.
examples.zh: 我们只得用力把门撞开。

examples.en: Michael is now merely a good friend.
examples.zh: 迈克尔现在只不过是一个好朋友而已。

examples.en: These reforms are not merely cosmetic.
examples.zh: 这些改革不仅仅是装点门面的。

examples.en: Calls by scientists for large increases in the appropriation of funds for public spending on agricultural research are more than justified.
examples.zh: 科学家们呼吁大幅增加农业研究的公共开支拨款，是非常合理的。

examples.en: Other charges include fraud and illegal appropriation of land.
examples.zh: 其他指控包括诈骗和非法占用土地。

examples.en: How can we resolve this apparent contradiction?
examples.zh: 我们怎样才能解决这个明显的矛盾呢？

examples.en: A 'nomad settlement' is a contradiction in terms.
examples.zh: “游牧者的定居”是用词上的自相矛盾。

examples.en: She was jealous of his wealth.
examples.zh: 她嫉妒他的富有。

examples.en: They enjoyed all the trappings of wealth.
examples.zh: 他们享有所有象征财富的东西。

examples.en: Friday 31 July 1925 henceforth became known as 'Red Friday'.
examples.zh: 1925年7月31日这个星期五从此以后就称为“红色星期五”。

examples.en: Henceforth all branches of the naval officer corps were equal to one another.
examples.zh: 从此以后海军军官团的各个分支都相互平等。

examples.en: This wallet feels like leather.
examples.zh: 这个钱包摸上去像是皮的。

examples.en: His wallet had been rifled.
examples.zh: 他的钱包被偷了。

examples.en: Most women will survive their spouses.
examples.zh: 大多数女性比她们的配偶活得长。

examples.en: He needs that amount of money to survive.
examples.zh: 他需要那笔钱来维持生活。

examples.en: We all desire health and happiness.
examples.zh: 我们都渴望健康和幸福。

examples.en: He was overestimating their desire for peace.
examples.zh: 他高估了他们对和平的渴望。

examples.en: The initial reaction has been excellent.
examples.zh: 最初的反应极好。

examples.en: My initial reaction was to decline the offer.
examples.zh: 我最初的反应是要婉言谢绝这个提议。

examples.en: The service at the hotel is efficient and unobtrusive.
examples.zh: 那旅馆的服务工作有效率而不夸张。

examples.en: Graphite is a highly efficient conductor of electricity.
examples.zh: 石墨是一种高效的电导体。

examples.en: The doctor said James had now developed a heart murmur.
examples.zh: 医生说詹姆斯心脏现在出现了杂音。

examples.en: The excited murmur grew louder as the whole group collected in the old dining room.
examples.zh: 当所有人都聚集在老旧的餐厅时，兴奋的低语声音越来越大。

examples.en: Fury propelled her into action.
examples.zh: 怒火驱使她行动起来。

examples.en: Her eyes were blazing with fury.
examples.zh: 她的双眼燃烧着怒火。

examples.en: However, any interpretation that seeks to unify all of the novel's diverse elements is bound to be somewhat unconvincing.
examples.zh: 然而，任何试图将小说的所有不同元素统一起来的解读，都必然有些难以令人信服。

examples.en: Stirrups unify lance, rkier, and horse into a force capable of unprecedented violence.
examples.zh: 马镫将骑枪、长矛和马团结在一起，形成一股具有空前暴力能力的力量。

examples.en: The muddy water slowly cleared.
examples.zh: 浑浊的水慢慢变得清澈起来。

examples.en: We squelched across the muddy field.
examples.zh: 我们扑哧扑哧地穿过泥泞的田地。

examples.en: The hound found a profound book on the roundabout.
examples.zh: 猎犬在旋转木马上找到一本深奥的书。

examples.en: Holmes thought deeply on the way home: the story of the Hound, Sir Charles's death, the strange letter, the missing boot and the black bearded man.
examples.zh: 在回家的路上，福尔摩斯沉思着猎犬的故事、查尔斯爵士的死、那封奇怪的信、丢失的靴子和那个黑胡子男人。

examples.en: A theory should be internally consistent.
examples.zh: 一套理论应当内在一致。

examples.en: We must be consistent in applying the rules.
examples.zh: 我们在实施这些规则时必须保持一致。

examples.en: The government is changing the rules for claiming dole.
examples.zh: 政府正在修改申领失业救济金的规定。

examples.en: Middle-class families see their graduate offspring on the dole queue and wonder why they bothered paying school fees.
examples.zh: 中产阶级家庭发现自己的孩子们在毕业后出现在领救济金的名单上，不明白为什么他们会饱受学费的困扰。

examples.en: In the south, the reverse applies.
examples.zh: 在南方，情况相反。

examples.en: In 2002 economic growth went into reverse.
examples.zh: 2002年，经济增长发生了逆转。

examples.en: The land was barren and infertile.
examples.zh: 这片土地荒芜而贫瘠。

examples.en: He wants to use the water to irrigate barren desert land.
examples.zh: 他想用该水来灌溉贫瘠的沙漠土地。

examples.en: He has the upbeat manner of an eternal optimist.
examples.zh: 他永远都持乐观主义者的那种快乐态度。

examples.en: It is an eternal concept.
examples.zh: 这是一个永恒的概念。

examples.en: The accident has not done any permanent damage.
examples.zh: 那场事故没有造成什么永久性损伤。

examples.en: She has been granted permanent residency in Britain.
examples.zh: 她获准在英国永久居住。

examples.en: Mr. Foster romped home with 141 votes.
examples.zh: 福斯特先生以141票轻松获胜。

examples.en: The children were placed with foster parents.
examples.zh: 这些小孩已安顿好，交给寄养父母了。

examples.en: The music was barely audible.
examples.zh: 音乐声勉强能听见。

examples.en: His words were barely audible.
examples.zh: 他的话勉强听得见。

examples.en: This condition is more prevalent in women than in men.
examples.zh: 这种情况在女性中比在男性中更为普遍。

examples.en: Despite the fact that the disease is so prevalent, treatment is still far from satisfactory.
examples.zh: 尽管事实上这种疾病非常普遍，治疗却远不尽如人意。

examples.en: Since you don't like your perception of him, why cling to it?
examples.zh: 既然你不喜欢你对他的看法，为什么还坚持这个看法呢？

examples.en: He had one last hope to cling on to.
examples.zh: 他还抱着最后的一线希望。

examples.en: The incidence of breast cancer increases with age.
examples.zh: 乳腺癌的发病率随着年龄的增长而上升。

examples.en: Incidence of the disease is fairly evenly spread across Europe.
examples.zh: 这种疾病的发生率在欧洲各地相当平均。

examples.en: She took the clip out of her hair.
examples.zh: 她从头发里取出发夹。

examples.en: He gave the hedge a clip.
examples.zh: 他把树篱修剪了一下。

examples.en: Be careful you don't knock your head on this low beam.
examples.zh: 小心，别把头撞在这矮梁上。

examples.en: Your calculation is way off beam.
examples.zh: 你的计算完全错误。

examples.en: Their bodies are sleek and compact.
examples.zh: 它们的身体光滑而紧实。

examples.en: It was a compact fluorescent light bulb.
examples.zh: 那是一个紧凑型荧光灯管。

examples.en: The alliance stands ready to do what is necessary.
examples.zh: 该联盟已准备好采取必要行动。

examples.en: Art shouldn't enter an unholy alliance with business.
examples.zh: 艺术不该和商业成为错误的同盟。

examples.en: In his job, patience is an invaluable asset.
examples.zh: 他干的这份工作，耐心是无价之宝。

examples.en: I was able to gain invaluable experience over that year.
examples.zh: 在那一年里我获得了十分宝贵的经验。

examples.en: The book intermingles fact and fiction.
examples.zh: 这本书事实和虚构并存。

examples.en: The book intermingles fact with fiction.
examples.zh: 这本书事实和虚构并存。

examples.en: Does this spell the doom of the physical book?
examples.zh: 这是否意味着实体书的末日？

examples.en: "Proud and insolent youth," said Hook, "prepare to meet thy doom."
examples.zh: “傲慢无礼的年轻人，”胡克说，“准备迎接你的厄运吧。”

examples.en: Bess stabbed a slice of cucumber.
examples.zh: 贝斯戳起一片黄瓜。

examples.en: Cucumber is good for soothing tired eyes.
examples.zh: 黄瓜对缓解眼睛疲劳很有效。

examples.en: The man had genius and had made his mark in the aviation world.
examples.zh: 那位男士拥有天赋，而且在航空界已经成名。

examples.en: The civil aviation minister ordered all the planes to be grounded.
examples.zh: 该民航部长命令所有飞机不得起飞。

examples.en: I think you're being far too pessimistic.
examples.zh: 我觉得你过于悲观了。

examples.en: Not everyone is so pessimistic about the future.
examples.zh: 并非每个人都对未来如此悲观。

examples.en: Many people believe that plural marriages denote immorality of other societies.
examples.zh: 许多人认为多妻制意味着其他社会的不道德。

examples.en: The flashing lights denote dangerous roads ahead.
examples.zh: 闪光表示前方道路危险。

examples.en: The course has a vocational emphasis.
examples.zh: 这门课程着重职业培训。

examples.en: Too much emphasis is placed on research.
examples.zh: 把重点过多地放在研究上。

examples.en: Why must she interrupt?
examples.zh: 她为什么偏要打断呢？

examples.en: Can I interrupt you just for a minute?
examples.zh: 我可不可以打断你一会儿？

examples.en: Plants won't propagate in these conditions.
examples.zh: 植物在这种条件下不能繁殖。

examples.en: The easiest way to propagate a vine is to take hardwood cuttings.
examples.zh: 繁殖葡萄藤最容易的办法就是采取硬木扦插。

examples.en: She questioned whether it was feasible to stimulate investment in these regions.
examples.zh: 她质问在这些地区刺激投资是否可行。

examples.en: How feasible is this vision?
examples.zh: 这一设想的可行性如何？

examples.en: A fine day, your Majesty!
examples.zh: 天气真好，陛下！

examples.en: The majesty of the skyscraper awed me.
examples.zh: 这幢摩天大厦的雄伟气势令我惊叹。

examples.en: Are you trying to flatter me?
examples.zh: 你是想讨好我？

examples.en: That colour doesn't flatter many people.
examples.zh: 那种颜色很多人都不适宜。

examples.en: Their potential is unrealized.
examples.zh: 他们没有发挥出潜力。

examples.en: The boy has great potential.
examples.zh: 这个男孩有很大的潜力。

examples.en: The thriving obsidian operation, for example, would necessitate more miners, additional manufacturers of obsidian tools, and additional traders to carry the goods to new markets.
examples.zh: 例如，蓬勃发展的黑曜石业务将需要更多的矿工、更多的黑曜石工具制造商和更多的贸易商将货物运往新市场。

examples.en: Does it necessitate a more convoluted build process?
examples.zh: 是否需要更加复杂的构建过程？

examples.en: Shavuot is a two-day festival for Orthodox Jews.
examples.zh: 五旬节是正统犹太教教民为期两天的节日。

examples.en: Most orthodox doctors however dismiss this as complete nonsense.
examples.zh: 然而大多数传统的医生将此视为纯粹的胡言乱语而不予考虑。

examples.en: Some are so accustomed to pigging out, they can't cut back.
examples.zh: 有些人习惯暴饮暴食了，他们不可能缩减食量。

examples.en: Mary Jo is still accustomed to travelling everywhere in style.
examples.zh: 玛丽·乔仍然习惯于很有气派地到处旅行。

examples.en: His treatment was a combination of surgery, radiation and drugs.
examples.zh: 对他的治疗是把手术、放射和药物治疗结合为一体。

examples.en: I can't remember the combination.
examples.zh: 我不记得密码锁的数码组合了。

examples.en: He admitted conspiring to obtain property by deception.
examples.zh: 他承认曾密谋通过欺骗获取财产。

examples.en: Can plants obtain adequate nourishment from such poor soil?
examples.zh: 土壤这样贫瘠，植物能获得足够的养分吗？

examples.en: Hamilton is a great statesman and political thinker.
examples.zh: 汉密尔顿是个伟大的政治家和政治思想家。

examples.en: Success in the talks will reinforce his reputation as an international statesman.
examples.zh: 谈判成功将会增强他作为国际政治家的声望。

examples.en: I usually tack on DS after the database name.
examples.zh: 我通常在数据库名称后附加 DS。

examples.en: Products are increasingly being morphed into tack-on feature sets of bigger products.
examples.zh: 产品越来越多地转变为更大产品的附加功能集。

examples.en: Gross sales reached nearly $2 million a year.
examples.zh: 全年总销售额达到近二百万美元。

examples.en: Interest is paid gross, rather than having tax deducted.
examples.zh: 利息按总额来付，没有扣除税收。

examples.en: Let's meet in the cocktail lounge at the Hilton.
examples.zh: 咱们在希尔顿酒店的酒廊见面吧。

examples.en: Alcoholic beverages are served in the hotel lounge.
examples.zh: 宾馆的休息室供应酒类饮料。

examples.en: A small boy tumbled off the porch.
examples.zh: 一个小男孩从门廊上摔了下去。

examples.en: I went out there on the front porch.
examples.zh: 我走了出来，到了前门廊。

examples.en: This workshop helps young unemployed people.
examples.zh: 这个讲习班帮助失业的年轻人。

examples.en: She got a bank loan to rent and equip a small workshop.
examples.zh: 她取得一笔银行贷款来租用和装备一个小车间。

examples.en: The leaflet is in PDF format.
examples.zh: 这个传单用的是可移植文档格式。

examples.en: They've brought out the magazine in a new format.
examples.zh: 他们用新的版式出版这杂志。

examples.en: Should motherhood necessarily mean sacrifice and self-denial?
examples.zh: 做母亲必须要自我牺牲和忘我吗？

examples.en: He was willing to sacrifice his happiness on the altar of fame.
examples.zh: 为了名声，他心甘情愿牺牲幸福。

examples.en: The deal may be ruled illegal.
examples.zh: 这笔交易可能会被判定为非法。

examples.en: It's illegal to deface property.
examples.zh: 在房子上乱涂乱画是非法的。

examples.en: She served in the medical corps.
examples.zh: 她在医务部队服过役。

examples.en: David McNeil is travelling with the White House press corps.
examples.zh: 大卫•麦克尼尔正与白宫记者团同行。

examples.en: A total solar eclipse is due to take place some time tomorrow.
examples.zh: 预计日全食会出现在明天的某个时候。

examples.en: An eclipse happens when the earth and moon are in line with the sun.
examples.zh: 地球和月亮与太阳处在一条直线上，日食就发生了。

examples.en: He wore formal evening dress.
examples.zh: 他穿了正式的晚礼服。

examples.en: The dinner was a formal affair.
examples.zh: 这是正式宴会。

examples.en: Economists who study the relationship between money and happiness have consistently found that, above a certain income, the two do not reliably correlate.
examples.zh: 研究金钱与幸福关系的经济学家们一致发现，在一定的收入之上，两者之间就并没有可靠的关联。

examples.en: The figures do not seem to correlate.
examples.zh: 这些数字似乎毫不相干。

examples.en: His market share continues to soar.
examples.zh: 他的市场份额不断高涨。

examples.en: The eagle can soar without flapping their wings.
examples.zh: 老鹰无需振翼就能翱翔。

examples.en: So how long is your commute?
examples.zh: 那么你上下班路程要花多长时间？

examples.en: People are prepared to commute long distances if they are desperate for work.
examples.zh: 亟须得到工作的人会愿意长途乘车往返上下班。

examples.en: Which planets can sustain life?
examples.zh: 哪些行星可以维持生命的存在？

examples.en: The ice will not sustain your weight.
examples.zh: 这冰承受不了你的体重。

examples.en: We need to become critical text-readers.
examples.zh: 我们需要成为批判性的文本阅读者。

examples.en: She viewed the findings with a critical eye.
examples.zh: 她以批评的眼光看待这些研究结果。

examples.en: The shepherd followed, carrying a torch to light his way.
examples.zh: 牧羊人跟在后面，举着火把把路照亮。

examples.en: God is my shepherd.
examples.zh: 神是我的牧者。

examples.en: The new tax provoked a public outcry.
examples.zh: 新税项引起了公众的强烈抗议。

examples.en: The killing caused an international outcry.
examples.zh: 该起谋杀引起了国际上强烈的抗议。

examples.en: She was radiant with health.
examples.zh: 她身体健康，容光焕发。

examples.en: On her wedding day the bride looked truly radiant.
examples.zh: 在她婚礼那天，新娘看起来真的是容光焕发。

examples.en: The principal is a very busy woman.
examples.zh: 校长是个大忙人。

examples.en: I sent a copy to the school principal.
examples.zh: 我寄了一份复印件给校长。

examples.en: We had an exceedingly good lunch.
examples.zh: 我们吃了一顿极其丰盛的午餐。

examples.en: Even in summer this place did not look exactly hospitable: in winter, conditions must have been exceedingly harsh.
examples.zh: 即使在夏天，这个地方看上去也并不太宜人：在冬天，条件一定非常恶劣。

examples.en: We have a duty to uphold the law.
examples.zh: 维护法律是我们的责任。

examples.en: Our policy has been to uphold the law.
examples.zh: 我们的政策一直是维护法律。

examples.en: Exotic pets are the in thing right now.
examples.zh: 奇异的宠物眼下很时髦。

examples.en: She has a partiality for exotic flowers.
examples.zh: 她特别喜爱异国花卉。

examples.en: Relief supplies were rushed in.
examples.zh: 救援物资很快就运来了。

examples.en: I breathed a sigh of relief.
examples.zh: 我安心地松了一口气。

examples.en: We are asking people to boycott goods from companies that use child labour.
examples.zh: 我们正呼吁大家抵制雇用童工的公司的产品。

examples.en: A spokesman says the president has backed off from his threat to boycott the conference.
examples.zh: 一位发言人说，总统已经撤回了他抵制这次会谈的威胁。

examples.en: You will open a new dimension to your life.
examples.zh: 你将为你的生活打开一个新的维度。

examples.en: Loutherbourg, like other contemporary painters, wanted to add the dimension of time to his paintings.
examples.zh: 像其他当代画家一样，卢德堡想要在他的绘画中加入时间这一维度。

examples.en: These proposals deserve careful study.
examples.zh: 这些建议值得认真研究。

examples.en: The players deserve a pat on the back.
examples.zh: 运动员们值得表扬。

examples.en: The process was needlessly slow.
examples.zh: 进程过于缓慢了。

examples.en: History is an interpretive process.
examples.zh: 历史是一个解释过程。

examples.en: The crime had revenge stamped all over it.
examples.zh: 从各方面看这次犯罪都是复仇行为。

examples.en: The arrests raised the spectre of revenge attacks.
examples.zh: 拘捕增加了对报复性攻击的恐惧。

examples.en: Troops were sent in to restore order.
examples.zh: 部队被派去恢复秩序。

examples.en: The police are trying to restore public order.
examples.zh: 警察正在努力恢复公共秩序。

examples.en: Which journals does the library subscribe to?
examples.zh: 图书馆订有哪些报刊？

examples.en: Maybe I ought to subscribe to the Engineering Quarterly.
examples.zh: 也许我应该订阅《工程季刊》。

examples.en: You can't distill it at that point here.
examples.zh: 在这个点无法浓缩。

examples.en: They do not distill the music-gathering process.
examples.zh: 他们不去浓缩提炼收集音乐的过程。

examples.en: There are alternative sources of nutrition to animal meat.
examples.zh: 有能替代动物肉类的其他营养来源。

examples.en: I was interested in alternative medicine and becoming an aromatherapist.
examples.zh: 我对替代疗法感兴趣，想成为一名芳香疗法治疗师。

examples.en: Tiredness affects your powers of concentration.
examples.zh: 疲劳影响注意力的集中。

examples.en: She frowned with concentration.
examples.zh: 她全神贯注，紧锁双眉。

examples.en: Acceleration and velocity are both vectors.
examples.zh: 加速度和速度都是矢量。

examples.en: Jaguars can move with an astonishing velocity.
examples.zh: 美洲豹跑起来速度惊人。

examples.en: People will encounter their destiny on the path of escaping from it.
examples.zh: 人会在逃避命运的路上，遇见自己的命运。

examples.en: Did you encounter anyone in the building?
examples.zh: 你在那栋大楼里偶然遇到什么人了吗？

examples.en: He managed to get a fellowship, and he came to the UK all the way from New Zealand.
examples.zh: 他设法获得了奖学金，从新西兰远道来到英国。

examples.en: He was offered a research fellowship at Yale.
examples.zh: 他得到了一个耶鲁大学的研究员职位。

examples.en: They rated him highly as a colleague.
examples.zh: 作为同事，他们对他评价甚高。

examples.en: He grimaced and looked narrowly at his colleague.
examples.zh: 他做了个鬼脸，然后仔细地看着同事。

examples.en: I don't approve of violence in any shape or form.
examples.zh: 我不赞成任何形式的暴力行为。

examples.en: She didn't approve of their choice of reading matter.
examples.zh: 她不赞同他们选用的阅读材料。

examples.en: They scored higher on social interaction.
examples.zh: 他们在社交互动方面得分更高。

examples.en: It is the gravitational interaction with planets, right?
examples.zh: 这是引力与行星的相互作用，对吧？

examples.en: Pedestrian accidents are down by 5%.
examples.zh: 行人受伤事故下降了5%。

examples.en: I traversed the narrow pedestrian bridge.
examples.zh: 我走过了那座狭窄的步行桥。

examples.en: We take the view that it would be wrong to interfere.
examples.zh: 我们所持的态度是：干涉是错误的。

examples.en: I try not to let work interfere with my personal life.
examples.zh: 我尽量不让工作干扰我的私生活。

examples.en: We rented an unfurnished apartment.
examples.zh: 我们租了一套不带家具的公寓。

examples.en: I've got a pleasant little apartment.
examples.zh: 我有一套舒适的小公寓。

examples.en: I don't have a bank account.
examples.zh: 我没有银行账户。

examples.en: What's your account number please?
examples.zh: 请问你的账户号码？

examples.en: He wore an ill-fitting green corduroy suit.
examples.zh: 他穿了一件很不合身的绿色灯芯绒西装。

examples.en: Tight fitting T-shirts are making a comeback.
examples.zh: 紧身短袖圆领T恤衫再度流行起来。

examples.en: A stack of files awaited me on my desk.
examples.zh: 我桌上有一堆文件正待我去处理。

examples.en: He ordered them to stack up pillows behind his back.
examples.zh: 他命令他们在他背后堆放一些枕头。

examples.en: Radioactive water had seeped into underground reservoirs.
examples.zh: 放射性水已渗入了地下蓄水池。

examples.en: The waste is safely locked away until it is no longer radioactive.
examples.zh: 废料被安全地封存，直到其不再有辐射。

examples.en: It is only natural that he should resent you.
examples.zh: 他会怨恨你是很自然的。

examples.en: The time had come when Mary had forgotten to resent Martha's familiar talk.
examples.zh: 到了玛丽不再厌恶玛莎唠叨的时候了。

examples.en: He set off with a loping stride.
examples.zh: 他迈着轻快的步伐出发了。

examples.en: He took the ridiculous accusation in stride.
examples.zh: 他从容应对那荒谬的指控。

examples.en: His role has always been ambiguous.
examples.zh: 他的角色一直不明确。

examples.en: The wording was deliberately ambiguous.
examples.zh: 这里的措辞故意模棱两可。

examples.en: He has an impulsive nature.
examples.zh: 他生性冲动。

examples.en: You're so impulsive!
examples.zh: 你太冲动了！

examples.en: There are qualitative differences between the two products.
examples.zh: 这两种产品存在着质的差别。

examples.en: There are qualitative differences in the way children of different ages and adults think.
examples.zh: 不同年龄的儿童和成人在思维方式上有着质的差异。

examples.en: Cuba is a composite of diverse traditions and people.
examples.zh: 古巴是一个不同传统和民族的融合体。

examples.en: The company owns a very diverse library of Arabic music.
examples.zh: 公司收藏有多种多样的阿拉伯音乐。

examples.en: Cook the bacon until it begins to crisp.
examples.zh: 烤制熏肉直到变脆。

examples.en: Bake until the pastry is golden and crisp.
examples.zh: 把油酥糕点烤至金黄酥脆。

examples.en: The Prime Minister was in ebullient mood.
examples.zh: 首相兴致勃勃。

examples.en: Somebody threw paint at the prime minister.
examples.zh: 有人朝首相扔油漆。

examples.en: She is famed for her intellect.
examples.zh: 她因才智而出名。

examples.en: Do the emotions develop in parallel with the intellect?
examples.zh: 情感与智力同步发展吗？

examples.en: I can't say that I have any particular preference.
examples.zh: 我说不出自己有什么特别偏好。

examples.en: Preference will be given to graduates of this university.
examples.zh: 这所大学的毕业生会获得优先考虑。

examples.en: He's a mild, inoffensive man.
examples.zh: 他是个温和有礼的男人。

examples.en: Coffee and tea are mild stimulants.
examples.zh: 咖啡和茶是轻度兴奋剂。

examples.en: They had remained loyal to the president.
examples.zh: 他们一直忠于总统。

examples.en: He went back to his loyal, long-suffering wife.
examples.zh: 他回到了对他忠贞不渝、长期受苦的妻子身边。

examples.en: A violent impact hurtled her forward.
examples.zh: 一股剧烈的冲击力将她猛地向前抛了出去。

examples.en: Her speech made a profound impact on everyone.
examples.zh: 她的讲话对每个人都有深远的影响。

examples.en: The strike caused total paralysis in the city.
examples.zh: 罢工使这座城市完全瘫痪。

examples.en: Poison from the fish causes paralysis, swelling, and nausea.
examples.zh: 这种鱼的毒素会引起瘫痪、肿胀、恶心。

examples.en: The court adjourned for lunch.
examples.zh: 午餐时间法庭休庭。

examples.en: The court is now in session.
examples.zh: 法庭现在正在开庭。

examples.en: We married in the college chapel.
examples.zh: 我们在学院的小教堂里结的婚。

examples.en: Sister Francesca entered the chapel.
examples.zh: 弗朗西丝卡修女走进小教堂。

examples.en: A painter may exaggerate or distort shapes and forms.
examples.zh: 画家可能会夸大或扭曲形状与形式。

examples.en: They could distort the achievement-based system of peer-review-led research.
examples.zh: 他们可能会扭曲以同行评审为导向、以学术成就基础的研究体系。

examples.en: WM Financial Services is a subsidiary of Washington Mutual.
examples.zh: 华盛顿互惠银行金融服务公司是华盛顿互惠银行的子公司。

examples.en: The company is a wholly-owned subsidiary of a large multinational.
examples.zh: 这是一家大型跨国企业的全资子公司。

examples.en: Grace was flushed with the success of the venture.
examples.zh: 格雷斯为这次成功冒险感到兴奋。

examples.en: People are afraid to venture out for fear of sniper attacks.
examples.zh: 人们不敢冒险外出，害怕狙击手的袭击。

examples.en: The adult observers were able to reliably discern an assortment of emotions on the babies' faces.
examples.zh: 成年观察者能够有依据地辨别出婴儿脸上的各种情绪。

examples.en: In the real world, problems rarely come neatly packaged, so being able to discern their deep structure is key.
examples.zh: 在现实世界中，问题很少会被完美地包装起来，因此能够识别它们的深层结构是关键。

examples.en: Enthusiasm is very catching.
examples.zh: 热情是非常具有感染力的。

examples.en: I really admire your enthusiasm.
examples.zh: 我确实钦佩你的热情。

examples.en: The talks can succeed if both sides are flexible and serious.
examples.zh: 如果双方都灵活并且认真，这些会谈就能成功。

examples.en: You need to be more flexible and imaginative in your approach.
examples.zh: 你的方法必须更加灵活，更富有想象力。

examples.en: Physics used to be very much a male domain.
examples.zh: 物理学曾在很大程度上是男人的领域。

examples.en: Users need to find out if a domain name is already registered or is still available.
examples.zh: 用户需要查明某个域名是已经被注册过还是仍然可用。

examples.en: Of these, 40% told census-takers they were Muslims.
examples.zh: 这些人当中，有40%的人告诉人口普查员说他们是穆斯林。

examples.en: The detailed assessment of the latest census will be ready in three months.
examples.zh: 有关最新人口普查的详细评估工作将在3个月内就绪。

examples.en: Detectives placed the corpse in a body bag.
examples.zh: 刑警们把尸体装进了一个运尸袋。

examples.en: The next witness proved the finding of the knife near the corpse.
examples.zh: 下一个证人证实在尸体附近发现了那把刀。

examples.en: They swear, they are ill-mannered and aggressive, willful as two-years-olds and utterly selfish.
examples.zh: 他们骂人，举止粗鲁，咄咄逼人，像两岁孩子一样任性，而且非常自私。

examples.en: For that, a half century of willful forgetting about painful memories like the German Titanic was perhaps a reasonable price to pay.
examples.zh: 为此，对像德国泰坦尼克号这样的痛苦回忆半个世纪的有意遗忘，也许是一个合理的代价。

examples.en: Their attitude irritates me.
examples.zh: 他们的态度激怒了我。

examples.en: Their attitude is so very English.
examples.zh: 他们的态度是十足的英格兰人的态度。

examples.en: He's a distant relative of the mayor.
examples.zh: 他是市长的远房亲戚。

examples.en: She enjoyed the relative informality of island life.
examples.zh: 她喜欢相对轻松随意的岛屿生活。

examples.en: The point of the lesson is to compare the two countries.
examples.zh: 本课的目的是比较这两个国家。

examples.en: Managers analyse their company's data and compare it with data on their competitors.
examples.zh: 经理们分析他们公司的数据并与其竞争者的数据进行比较。

examples.en: Although we still depict nostalgic snow scenes on Christmas cards, winters are now very much warmer.
examples.zh: 虽然我们还在圣诞卡上描绘引人怀旧的雪景，但现在冬天温暖多了。

examples.en: It proved hard to depict objectively.
examples.zh: 事实证明很难客观地描述它。

examples.en: Rabbits hop in the grass.
examples.zh: 兔子在草地里跳。

examples.en: Hop in, I'll drive you home.
examples.zh: 快上车吧，我开车送你回家。

examples.en: She spoke with characteristic enthusiasm.
examples.zh: 她说话带着特有的热情。

examples.en: He replied with characteristic insouciance: "So what?"
examples.zh: 他用特有的漫不经心的口吻答道：“那又怎么样？”

examples.en: One of the main themes of TQM is employee involvement.
examples.zh: 全员质量管理的一个主要原则之一是雇员参与。

examples.en: There was a growing unease about their involvement in the war.
examples.zh: 他们对卷入战争感到日益不安。

examples.en: I believe this treaty will pave the way to peace in Europe.
examples.zh: 我相信这个条约将为欧洲的和平铺平道路。

examples.en: In India, they mix thrown-out plastic waste with asphalt and use it to pave new roadways.
examples.zh: 在印度，他们把丢弃的塑料废品和沥青混合起来，用来铺设新的道路。

examples.en: As an integral part of learning, it brings about positive changes, making people develop and grow.
examples.zh: 作为学习的一个组成部分，它带来了积极的变化，使人发展和成长。

examples.en: Materials and methods of construction are integral parts of the design of architecture structures.
examples.zh: 建筑材料和施工方法是建筑结构设计的重要组成部分。

examples.en: Mineral oils are used to lubricate machinery.
examples.zh: 矿物油被用来润滑机器。

examples.en: Oil riches, naturally, would lubricate the process.
examples.zh: 石油资源丰富，自然使这个过程更容易一些。

examples.en: The orbit of this comet intersects the orbit of the Earth.
examples.zh: 这颗彗星的轨道和地球的轨道相交。

examples.en: We were not altogether sure that the comet would miss the Earth.
examples.zh: 我们不太确定这颗彗星是否会错过地球。

examples.en: I prefer to work to a deadline.
examples.zh: 我喜欢按规定的期限完成工作。

examples.en: They were trying to beat the midnight deadline.
examples.zh: 他们正在试图赶在午夜的最后期限前完成。

examples.en: I wasn't going to let him bully me.
examples.zh: 我可不会让他欺负我。

examples.en: Damn you! I'm not going to let you bully me.
examples.zh: 你这个浑蛋！我决不让你欺负我。

examples.en: The cup had a small chip.
examples.zh: 这个杯子有个小缺口。

examples.en: Today's silicon chip-based computers can't come close.
examples.zh: 现今的基于芯片的计算机根本比不上。

examples.en: It is a perfect example of a medieval castle.
examples.zh: 这是最典型的中世纪城堡。

examples.en: He began studying politics and medieval history.
examples.zh: 他开始学习政治学和中世纪史。

examples.en: A Greek oil tanker has run aground.
examples.zh: 一艘希腊油轮已经搁浅了。

examples.en: The tanker began to spill its cargo of oil.
examples.zh: 油轮已开始漏油。

examples.en: The treatment does not involve the use of any artificial drugs.
examples.zh: 这种疗法不涉及任何人造药物的使用。

examples.en: Most political questions involve morality in some form or other.
examples.zh: 多数政治问题牵涉到这样或那样的道义性。

examples.en: The man fired several shots from his pistol.
examples.zh: 那个男人用手枪开了几枪。

examples.en: Three of the victims were pistol-whipped and two were shot.
examples.zh: 三个被害者被用手枪柄打过，两个遭到枪击。

examples.en: The shelves are easy to assemble.
examples.zh: 搁架容易装配。

examples.en: The cupboard is easy to assemble.
examples.zh: 这个橱柜容易组装。

examples.en: The rules state that samples must be enclosed in two watertight containers.
examples.zh: 条例规定样品必须用两个不漏水的容器封装起来。

examples.en: If she could just establish the time the picture had been taken, Mick would have a watertight alibi.
examples.zh: 只要她能确定拍这张照片的时间，米克就可以有一个无懈可击的不在现场的证据。

examples.en: The transition from school to work can be difficult.
examples.zh: 从在学校念书到上班工作，这一转变有时候可真不容易。

examples.en: The French say they favour a transition to democracy.
examples.zh: 法国人说他们更喜欢向民主的过渡。

examples.en: They have fifty thousand troops along the border ready to repel any attack.
examples.zh: 他们沿边界有5万军队，随时准备击退任何进攻。

examples.en: Ants store food, repel attackers and use chemical signals to contact one another in case of attack.
examples.zh: 蚂蚁储存食物，击退攻击者，并使用化学信号联系彼此以防被攻击。

examples.en: "Excuse me," I mutter, "I have to get this sham over with."
examples.zh: “对不起。”我喃喃地说，“我得把这个假动作做完。”

examples.en: John would rub his eyes and mutter, "It is true, we did fly."
examples.zh: 约翰揉了揉眼睛，喃喃自语道：“这是真的，我们真的飞了。”

examples.en: Her new series is a smash hit.
examples.zh: 她的新系列节目极为成功，引起轰动。

examples.en: Her new series is compulsive viewing.
examples.zh: 她的新系列节目引人入胜。

examples.en: The instructions look very complicated.
examples.zh: 这说明书看起来很难懂。

examples.en: The instructions were rather complicated.
examples.zh: 这些说明相当复杂。

examples.en: He lived on a diet of junk food.
examples.zh: 他把垃圾食品当饭吃。

examples.en: We still get junk mail for the previous occupants.
examples.zh: 我们仍会收到给先前住户的垃圾邮件。

examples.en: We need an extra 6 grams a day maximum.
examples.zh: 我们一天最多还需要6克。

examples.en: What is the absolute maximum you can afford to pay?
examples.zh: 你最多能出多少钱？

examples.en: New businesses thrive in this area.
examples.zh: 新商家在这一地区蓬勃兴起。

examples.en: Today her company continues to thrive.
examples.zh: 如今，她的公司继续蓬勃发展。

examples.en: The show's a keeper–daring, imaginative and provocative.
examples.zh: 这部电影值得收藏–大胆、富于想像力和煽动性。

examples.en: You need to be more flexible and imaginative in your approach.
examples.zh: 你的方法必须更加灵活，更富有想象力。

examples.en: This animal is a penguin.
examples.zh: 这个动物是企鹅。

examples.en: Pierre is a 25-year-old penguin at the California Academy of Sciences.
examples.zh: 这只企鹅名为皮埃尔，25岁，来自加利福尼亚科学院。

examples.en: The carvings represent a hunting scene.
examples.zh: 这些雕刻作品描绘了一幅狩猎的场面。

examples.en: A lawyer was appointed to represent the child.
examples.zh: 一位律师被指定为这个孩子的代表律师。

examples.en: The work was acclaimed as a masterpiece.
examples.zh: 该作品被誉为杰作。

examples.en: The painting is a masterpiece in the truest sense of the word.
examples.zh: 这幅画是名副其实的杰作。

examples.en: We can't compete with them on price.
examples.zh: 我们在价格上无法与他们竞争。

examples.en: The company must reduce costs to compete effectively.
examples.zh: 公司要有效地参与竞争必须降低成本。

examples.en: Is she more mellow and tolerant?
examples.zh: 她更平和、更宽容了吗？

examples.en: The plants are tolerant of frost.
examples.zh: 这些植物耐霜。

examples.en: The dispatch of the task force is purely a contingency measure.
examples.zh: 派遣特遣队纯粹是应急措施。

examples.en: Mr. Vlok promised new measures to protect residents, including the dispatch of police and troop reinforcements.
examples.zh: 乌洛克先生答应了新的保护居民的措施，包括派遣增援的警察和军队。

examples.en: Emergency generators cut in.
examples.zh: 应急发电机启动了。

examples.en: The government had to take emergency action.
examples.zh: 政府只得采取紧急措施。

examples.en: The room was dim and cool and quiet.
examples.zh: 这房间昏暗、阴冷且安静。

examples.en: Her future career prospects look dim.
examples.zh: 她的前程看来很暗淡。

examples.en: They just don't let it paralyze them.
examples.zh: 他们只是不会使其让自己处于被动。

examples.en: Fear of failure didn't paralyze them.
examples.zh: 对失败的恐惧感不会让他们停止向前。

examples.en: Training in interpersonal skills is essential.
examples.zh: 各种人际交往技巧的训练是非常必要的。

examples.en: Humor is vital to interpersonal relationships.
examples.zh: 幽默感对人际关系至关重要。

examples.en: Underpinning this success has been an exemplary record of innovation.
examples.zh: 支持这一成功的基础是一次堪称典范的革新记录。

examples.en: From the earliest days of the Renaissance, the writing of history meant recounting the exemplary lives of great men.
examples.zh: 从文艺复兴初期开始，历史写作就意味着要重述伟人的模范生活。

examples.en: The faculty agreed on a change in the requirements.
examples.zh: 全体教员同意改变要求。

examples.en: How can faculty improve their teaching so as to encourage creativity?
examples.zh: 全体教员怎样才能改进教学以便激发创造力？

examples.en: I could point at all those layoff statistics. Or I could frighten you by bringing up the specter of your job going overseas.
examples.zh: 我可以指出所有那些裁员的数据。或者，我可以提出你去海外工作这一幽灵来吓唬你。

examples.en: Some fool even themselves, until some life event—a layoff, an empty nest, an inheritance that frees them to spend time as they like—jolts them into taking stock of their true natures.
examples.zh: 有些人甚至欺骗了自己，直到生活中发生了一些事情——失业、空巢、一笔可以让他们自由支配时间的遗产——让他们开始审视自己的本性。

examples.en: She finally agreed to have the wretched animal put down.
examples.zh: 她最后同意用药结束这头可怜的动物的生命。

examples.en: The wretched Hatter trembled so, that he shook both his shoes off.
examples.zh: 可怜的帽商听到这话，吓得浑身发抖，连两只鞋都抖掉了。

examples.en: He has a good sense of the absurd.
examples.zh: 他对荒诞事物有较强的识别能力。

examples.en: Of course it's not true, what an absurd idea.
examples.zh: 那当然不合乎事实，这个想法太荒唐了！

examples.en: He accepted the award with characteristic modesty.
examples.zh: 他以他一贯的谦逊态度接受了奖励。

examples.en: "Your modesty is a cover for your overweening conceit," she said.
examples.zh: “你用谦逊的外表掩饰自负的内心，”她说。

examples.en: It was very considerate of him to wait.
examples.zh: 他一直在等候着，真是体贴人。

examples.en: He was charming, considerate and impeccably mannered.
examples.zh: 他富有魅力，待人体贴，举止无可挑剔。

examples.en: This is a club design by the company blacksheep, this is straight glamor out of a hip hop.
examples.zh: 黑羊公司设计的这间俱乐部，声名在外，不同凡响 。

examples.en: This is the power of glamor of debate!
examples.zh: 这就是辩论的力量和魅力！

examples.en: The vital clue to the killer's identity was his nickname, Peanuts.
examples.zh: 关于杀手身份的重大线索是他的绰号——花生。

examples.en: Geneticists in Canada have discovered a clue to the puzzle of why our cells get old and die.
examples.zh: 加拿大的遗传学家已经发现了解开我们细胞衰老死亡之迷的线索。

examples.en: Each bracket is fixed to the wall with just three screws.
examples.zh: 每个托架只用3颗螺钉固定在墙上。

examples.en: Most of the houses are out of our price bracket.
examples.zh: 大多数房子都超出我们的价格范围。

examples.en: He vowed to take legal action.
examples.zh: 他发誓要诉诸法律行动。

examples.en: What I did was perfectly legal.
examples.zh: 我做的事情完全合法。

examples.en: She stood preening in their midst, delighted with the attention.
examples.zh: 她得意洋洋地站在他们中间，为受人瞩目而高兴。

examples.en: Many were surprised to see him exposed like this in the midst of a large crowd.
examples.zh: 很多人看到他这样暴露在一大群人当中，都感到很意外。

examples.en: How often do you show this trait?
examples.zh: 你多久会展现出这种特质一次？

examples.en: We call this trait sensation-seeking.
examples.zh: 我们把这种特质称为寻求刺激。

examples.en: He indicated a semicircle with a radius of about thirty miles.
examples.zh: 他标示出一个半径大约三十英里的半圆。

examples.en: Simply change the radius to 2000, and you should start to see some results.
examples.zh: 只需将半径更改为2000，您应当便会看到一些结果，当然。

examples.en: The report describes the catastrophic disintegration of the aircraft after the explosion.
examples.zh: 该报道描述了爆炸后飞机的灾难性崩解。

examples.en: The incident has hastened the disintegration of the club.
examples.zh: 这一事件加速了该俱乐部的解体。

examples.en: When I give the signal , run!
examples.zh: 我一发信号，你就跑！

examples.en: At an agreed signal they left the room.
examples.zh: 收到约定的信号后，他们离开了房间。

examples.en: It may impair the digestive system.
examples.zh: 它可能会损害消化系统。

examples.en: Their inability to scowl seemed to impair their ability to see why pushy telemarketers or a lack of birthday wishes might make one's face fall.
examples.zh: 他们无法动怒似乎削弱了他们的能力，让他们明白为什么咄咄逼人的电话推销员或没得到生日祝愿可能会让一个人沉下脸来。

examples.en: The dolphin is an intelligent animal.
examples.zh: 海豚是聪明的动物。

examples.en: The dolphin has evolved a highly developed jaw.
examples.zh: 海豚已经进化形成高度发达的下颌。

examples.en: Did you have a chance to do any sightseeing ?
examples.zh: 你有没有出去游览的机会？

examples.en: Sightseeing is best done either by tour bus or by bicycles.
examples.zh: 观光最好要么乘游览巴士，要么骑自行车。

examples.en: A stray dog came up to him.
examples.zh: 一只走失的狗来到他跟前。

examples.en: The dog was a stray which had been adopted.
examples.zh: 这只狗是被收养的流浪狗。

examples.en: Saturn is the second biggest planet in the solar system.
examples.zh: 土星是太阳系的第二大的行星。

examples.en: The new planet is about ten times the size of the earth.
examples.zh: 这个新发现的行星大约是地球大小的10倍。

examples.en: My car needs a new exhaust.
examples.zh: 我的汽车需要一个新排气管。

examples.en: The exhaust streamed black smoke.
examples.zh: 排气管里冒出黑烟。

examples.en: Thereafter she wrote articles for papers and magazines in Paris.
examples.zh: 从那以后，她为巴黎的报纸和杂志撰稿。

examples.en: The plan will help you lose 3-4 pounds the first week, and 1-2 pounds the weeks thereafter.
examples.zh: 该计划将帮助你在第1周减3到4磅，其后每周减1到2磅。

examples.en: Vitamin C is water soluble.
examples.zh: 维生素C可溶于水。

examples.en: The red dye on the leather is water-soluble.
examples.zh: 皮革上的红色染料是水溶性的。

examples.en: The Jewish feast of Passover began last night.
examples.zh: 犹太人的宗教节日逾越节昨晚开始了。

examples.en: The feast was served by his mother and sisters.
examples.zh: 宴席由他的母亲和姐妹们招待。

examples.en: Cats have good night vision.
examples.zh: 猫在夜间视力好。

examples.en: My vision has grown so hazy.
examples.zh: 我的视力已经变得非常模糊。

examples.en: Ken agreed to accompany me on a trip to Africa.
examples.zh: 肯同意陪我去非洲旅行。

examples.en: Barron invited her to accompany him to the races.
examples.zh: 巴伦邀请了她陪他去看比赛。

examples.en: The new armor is not pure liquid, of course.
examples.zh: 当然，这种新型的装甲并不是纯液体。

examples.en: There is a guy in a bunch of armor on a horse.
examples.zh: 有一个穿着盔甲的人骑在马上。

examples.en: The new laws have gained widespread acceptance.
examples.zh: 新法律获得广泛赞同。

examples.en: The acceptance of new members is strictly controlled.
examples.zh: 接纳新成员的工作受到严格控制。

examples.en: A good diet is beneficial to health.
examples.zh: 良好的饮食有益于健康。

examples.en: Early resolution of geopolitical issues would be beneficial.
examples.zh: 尽早解决地缘政治学议题是有益的。

examples.en: The area is a birdwatcher's paradise.
examples.zh: 这一地区是鸟类观察者的乐园。

examples.en: The Koran describes paradise as a place containing a garden of delight.
examples.zh: 《古兰经》把天堂描绘成一个拥有快乐花园的地方。

examples.en: We were awarded a penalty after a late tackle.
examples.zh: 对方铲球犯规后，我们得到了一个点球。

examples.en: You would be well advised to tackle this problem urgently.
examples.zh: 你还是抓紧处理这个问题为好。

examples.en: I reckon she's pulling in over $100 000.
examples.zh: 我估计她要赚10多万。

examples.en: I reckon (that) I'm going to get that job.
examples.zh: 我认为我会得到那份工作。

examples.en: Mandy's predominant emotion was confusion.
examples.zh: 曼迪的主导情绪是困惑。

examples.en: Teddy turned to Mona with a look of mild confusion.
examples.zh: 特迪转向莫娜，脸上带着些许困惑。

examples.en: It was all a ploy to distract attention from his real aims.
examples.zh: 那全是障眼法，借以转移对他真实目的的注意。

examples.en: It was another attempt to distract attention from the truth.
examples.zh: 这又是企图分散人们对事实真相的注意力。

examples.en: Her ire slid between us like the spanner from Father's workshop, straining our hinge.
examples.zh: 她的怒气像父亲作坊里的扳手一样夹在我们中间，绷紧了我们的铰链。

examples.en: By varying the width of the black lines, or hinges, researchers are able to change how far each hinge folds.
examples.zh: 通过改变黑色线条或者铰链的宽度，研究员可以改变每条铰链可以折叠的范围。

examples.en: The company has a virtual monopoly in this area of trade.
examples.zh: 这家公司实质上已经垄断了这种贸易。

examples.en: Up to four players can compete in a virtual world of role playing.
examples.zh: 最多能有4个人可以在虚拟世界中扮演角色进行角逐。

examples.en: We managed to squeeze six people into the car.
examples.zh: 我们在那辆车上挤进了六个人。

examples.en: Seven people in the car was a bit of a squeeze.
examples.zh: 那辆车坐了七个人是有点挤。

examples.en: Do we have a blank video ?
examples.zh: 我们有空白录像带吗？

examples.en: I'm sorry, but my mind is a blank.
examples.zh: 很抱歉，可是我脑子里一片空白。

examples.en: Additional cream would make it too rich.
examples.zh: 额外的奶油会使它过于油腻。

examples.en: The filming imposed an additional strain on her.
examples.zh: 影片拍摄使她承受了额外的压力。

examples.en: A number of the report's findings are worthy of note.
examples.zh: 这份报告里有些调查结果值得注意。

examples.en: He felt he was not worthy of her.
examples.zh: 他觉得他配不上她。

examples.en: As ever, the meals are primarily fish-based.
examples.zh: 像往常那样，餐餐以鱼类为主。

examples.en: Flycatchers feed primarily on winged insects.
examples.zh: 鹟主要捕食有翼昆虫。

examples.en: The news gave a fillip to the telecommunications sector.
examples.zh: 这个消息给电信部门注了一剂强心针。

examples.en: The television screens of the next century will be linked up to an emerging world telecommunications grid.
examples.zh: 下个世纪的电视屏幕将与一种新兴的世界电信网格相连。

examples.en: We caught the ferry at Ostend.
examples.zh: 我们在奥斯坦德及时赶上了渡船。

examples.en: The ferry hit us amidships.
examples.zh: 渡轮拦腰撞了我们的船只。

examples.en: It would be a mistake to ignore his opinion.
examples.zh: 忽略他的意见是不对的。

examples.en: Such arguments ignore the question of where ultimate responsibility lay.
examples.zh: 此类争论忽视了最终责任何在的问题。

examples.en: They say God spoke to them and told them to go on a mission to the poorest country in the Western Hemisphere.
examples.zh: 他们说上帝向他们开口讲话，告诉他们到西半球最贫穷的国家继续进行传教活动。

examples.en: Of course, were they the first people in the Western hemisphere?
examples.zh: 当然，他们是西半球的第一批人吗？

examples.en: The reception was a subdued affair.
examples.zh: 招待会开得冷冷清清的。

examples.en: All visitors must report to reception.
examples.zh: 所有来宾必须到接待处报到。

examples.en: We applaud her decision.
examples.zh: 我们称赞她的决定。

examples.en: He started to applaud and the others joined in.
examples.zh: 他开始鼓掌，其他人也跟着鼓起掌来。

examples.en: The top door opened outward.
examples.zh: 最上面的门向外开着。

examples.en: Mark showed no outward signs of distress.
examples.zh: 马克在外表上没有现出沮丧的神色来。

examples.en: "Well I suppose it is based on the old lunar months, isn't it?"—"Yes, that's right."
examples.zh: “嗯，我想它是基于旧的阴历月份的，不是吗？”—“对，是那样的。”

examples.en: Bring lunar materials back to Earth.
examples.zh: 把月球上的物质带回地球。

examples.en: His poetry is very cerebral.
examples.zh: 他的诗富涵理性。

examples.en: Jay reads poetry so beautifully.
examples.zh: 杰伊朗读诗歌非常动听。

examples.en: Has the jury reached a verdict ?
examples.zh: 陪审团作出裁定了吗？

examples.en: The jury acquitted him of murder.
examples.zh: 陪审团裁决他谋杀罪不成立。

examples.en: That sounds arrogant, doesn't it?
examples.zh: 那听起来很傲慢，不是吗？

examples.en: She was said to be proud and arrogant.
examples.zh: 据说，她骄傲且自大。

examples.en: I felt like a complete idiot.
examples.zh: 我感到完全像个傻瓜。

examples.en: I realized I was babbling like an idiot.
examples.zh: 我意识到我像个傻瓜一样在胡言乱语。

examples.en: They raced to a thrilling victory in the relay.
examples.zh: 他们在接力赛中取得了激动人心的胜利。

examples.en: The satellite will be used mainly to relay television programmes.
examples.zh: 这颗卫星将主要用来转播电视节目。

examples.en: The priest anointed her with oil.
examples.zh: 神父为她傅油。

examples.en: The priest intoned the final prayer.
examples.zh: 神父庄重地念了最后的祷文。

examples.en: Your doctor will monitor your blood pressure.
examples.zh: 你的医生会监测你的血压。

examples.en: Officials had not been allowed to monitor the voting.
examples.zh: 官员们未曾获许监控选举。

examples.en: She is licensed to fly solo.
examples.zh: 她已获准单飞。

examples.en: The slow movement opens with a cello solo.
examples.zh: 慢乐章开头是一段大提琴独奏。

examples.en: Your parents will have to cover your tuition fees.
examples.zh: 你的父母得支付你的学费。

examples.en: Do parents have to bear the whole cost of tuition fees?
examples.zh: 父母是否应当负担全部学费？

examples.en: Water will easily permeate a cotton dress.
examples.zh: 水很容易渗透棉布衣服。

examples.en: Fossils are often washed together on-site in a large bath which can allow water and contaminants in the form of contemporary DNA to permeate into the porous bones.
examples.zh: 化石通常在大浴池中进行现场清洗，这可以使水和现代 DNA 形式的污染物渗透到多孔骨骼中。

examples.en: This tendency in his thought is deepened by his suspicion of all Utopian political programmes.
examples.zh: 他思想中这种倾向因他对所有乌托邦政治计划的猜疑而加深。

examples.en: There have been a lot of utopian cities in history.
examples.zh: 历史上有很多乌托邦式的城市。

examples.en: We have a very crowded schedule.
examples.zh: 我们的日程排得满满的。

examples.en: Everything went according to schedule.
examples.zh: 一切都是按计划进行的。

examples.en: They never became tame; they would run away if you approached them.
examples.zh: 它们从没有被驯服，如果你靠近，它们就跑开了。

examples.en: These ideas may seem tame today, but they were inflammatory in his time.
examples.zh: 这些想法今天看来也许是平淡乏味的，但在他那个时代却是很有煽动性的。

examples.en: Our two houses adjoin.
examples.zh: 我们俩的房屋邻接着。

examples.en: The two bedrooms adjoin.
examples.zh: 这两间卧室毗连。

examples.en: The universe is slowly yielding up its secrets.
examples.zh: 宇宙慢慢地展现出它的秘密。

examples.en: The idea of a parallel universe is hard to grasp.
examples.zh: 认为另有一个平行宇宙的概念是很难理解的。

examples.en: He has no son to inherit his land.
examples.zh: 他没有儿子来继承他的土地。

examples.en: Sheila will inherit everything in the event of his death.
examples.zh: 他一旦故去，所有财产都由希拉继承。

examples.en: He felt an overwhelming sense of loss.
examples.zh: 他感到非常失落。

examples.en: The sense of déjà vu was overwhelming.
examples.zh: 似曾经历过的感觉非常强烈。

examples.en: The students were asked to interpret the poem.
examples.zh: 学生们被要求诠释那首诗的意义。

examples.en: She couldn't speak much English so her children had to interpret for her.
examples.zh: 她讲不了几句英语，所以她的孩子们得给她翻译。

examples.en: I had a peculiar feeling we'd met before.
examples.zh: 我有一种奇怪的感觉，觉得我们以前见过面。

examples.en: For some peculiar reason , she refused to come inside.
examples.zh: 出于某种奇怪的原因，她拒绝到里面来。

examples.en: It's just the first half of an idiom.
examples.zh: 它只是一个习语的前半部分。

examples.en: Let us look at an idiom: kill two birds with double-edged sword.
examples.zh: 我们再看一个成语：一举两得/一箭双雕。

examples.en: Fearey had all the charm and urbanity of the trained diplomat.
examples.zh: 费尔里有着受过训练的外交家都有的所有魅力和社交礼节。

examples.en: The two countries have each expelled another diplomat following a round of tit-for-tat expulsions.
examples.zh: 在一轮以牙还牙的驱逐行动之后，这两个国家又分别驱逐了一位外交官。

examples.en: She gave her mother a big hug.
examples.zh: 她热烈地拥抱了她的母亲。

examples.en: She opened her arms and gave me a big hug.
examples.zh: 她张开双臂，紧紧地拥抱了我。

examples.en: We have a reservation in the name of Grant.
examples.zh: 我们是以格兰特的名字预订的。

examples.en: The film features Cary Grant as a professor.
examples.zh: 这部电影由卡里•格兰特饰演一位教授。

examples.en: He is tall, broad and muscular.
examples.zh: 他身高体宽，肌肉发达。

examples.en: Like most athletes, she was lean and muscular.
examples.zh: 像大部分运动员一样，她清瘦而且肌肉强健。

examples.en: The performance lacked sparkle.
examples.zh: 这场演出缺少亮点。

examples.en: There was a sparkle of excitement in her eyes.
examples.zh: 她眼里闪耀着激动的光芒。

examples.en: The place is really beginning to hum.
examples.zh: 这个地方真的开始热闹繁忙起来了。

examples.en: In the background was that eternal hum.
examples.zh: 背景里是那没完没了的哼哼声。

examples.en: Royal gossip is a staple of the tabloid press.
examples.zh: 围绕王室成员的飞短流长是小报的主要内容。

examples.en: Fish is a staple in the diet of many Africans.
examples.zh: 鱼是许多非洲人饮食中的主食。

examples.en: Do you give any discount?
examples.zh: 你们打折吗？

examples.en: They are often available at a discount.
examples.zh: 它们经常可以以折扣价买到。

examples.en: My next work was to construct a nest and anchor it in a tree.
examples.zh: 我的下一步工作是建造一个巢穴,并把它固定在树上。

examples.en: Now let us construct two three-member sets based on the results.
examples.zh: 现在让我们根据结果构造两个三成员集。

examples.en: The King chafed bitterly over the stupendous indignity thus put upon his royalty, but Hendon was moody and taciturn.
examples.zh: 国王对他的王权受到的巨大侮辱感到非常愤怒，亨顿更是憋住一肚子气，沉默寡言。

examples.en: We were treated like royalty.
examples.zh: 我们受到了君王般的礼遇。

examples.en: This requires open investments to help doctors convert.
examples.zh: 这需要开放投资来帮助医生们完成这一转变。

examples.en: She, too, was a convert to Roman Catholicism.
examples.zh: 她也改信罗马天主教了。

examples.en: They made no attempt to escape.
examples.zh: 他们没有企图逃跑。

examples.en: I was forced to attempt a gallop.
examples.zh: 我被迫尝试一次骑马疾驰。

examples.en: It was Allen who fired this rivalry with real passion.
examples.zh: 是艾伦满怀激情地激发了这次对抗。

examples.en: There is more to the rivalry between rail and air than the experience in transit.
examples.zh: 铁路和航空之间的竞争不仅仅是运输方面的经验。

examples.en: She savoured the moment with obvious relish.
examples.zh: 她显然津津有味地回味着那一刻。

examples.en: The three men ate with relish.
examples.zh: 那3个人吃得津津有味。

examples.en: Fluorescent lights flickered, and then the room was blindingly bright.
examples.zh: 荧光灯闪了闪，接着房间里就亮得令人目眩了。

examples.en: Fluorescent lights flickered, and then the room was brilliantly, blindingly bright.
examples.zh: 荧光灯闪烁了几下，然后房间就亮得刺眼。

examples.en: He joined the 40th Division as an army chaplain.
examples.zh: 他加入了第40师当军队牧师。

examples.en: Ford was attached to the 101st Airborne Division.
examples.zh: 福特曾属于第101空降师。

examples.en: She's so superficial!
examples.zh: 她太肤浅了！

examples.en: The other injured man had a superficial stomach wound.
examples.zh: 另一名受伤男子是腹部表层受伤。

examples.en: The heroine is a senior TV executive.
examples.zh: 女主人公是一位电视台高级主管。

examples.en: He is to remain in the hot seat as chief executive.
examples.zh: 他将继续留在公司首席行政官这个身负重任的位子上。

examples.en: They will be helped by the very latest in navigation aids.
examples.zh: 他们将得到最新的导航设备的帮助。

examples.en: Pack ice around Iceland was becoming a threat to navigation.
examples.zh: 冰岛周围的浮冰一度成为船舶航行的威胁。

examples.en: The snow was beginning to melt.
examples.zh: 积雪开始融化了。

examples.en: As the climate warms (up) the ice caps will melt.
examples.zh: 随着气候变暖，冰盖将融化。

examples.en: A single pale blue flower grows up from each joint on a long stalk.
examples.zh: 一根长梗的每个节上都长出了一朵淡蓝色的花。

examples.en: Police officers lie in wait for the gangs who stalk their prey at night.
examples.zh: 警官们埋伏起来等待捉拿那些夜间悄悄追踪作案对象的黑帮成员。

examples.en: Some of the studies show positive results, whereas others do not.
examples.zh: 有一些研究结果令人满意，然而其他的则不然。

examples.en: She has authentic charm whereas most people simply have nice manners.
examples.zh: 她有真正的魅力，而大多数人只是有礼貌而已。

examples.en: All too often you pitch the ball short.
examples.zh: 你投球老是距离不够。

examples.en: He was stretchered off the pitch with a broken leg.
examples.zh: 他腿骨折了，从球场上抬了下去。

examples.en: There are fears that the casualty toll may be higher.
examples.zh: 人们担心伤亡人数可能会更多。

examples.en: Training includes realistic simulation of casualty procedures.
examples.zh: 训练包括伤亡处理程序的实际模拟。

examples.en: The fuel gauge had gone on the blink.
examples.zh: 燃料计出毛病了。

examples.en: Tomorrow's game against Arsenal will be a good gauge of their promotion chances.
examples.zh: 明天与阿森纳队的比赛是衡量他们能否升级的很好的依据。

examples.en: There were Oriental carpets on the floors.
examples.zh: 地板上铺着东方的地毯。

examples.en: This design came to be known as the Oriental style.
examples.zh: 这种设计后来被称为东方风格。

examples.en: The company is a world leader in electrical goods.
examples.zh: 这家公司的电器产品在全世界首屈一指。

examples.en: The fire was started by an electrical short-circuit.
examples.zh: 火灾是由电线短路引发的。

examples.en: He sold boots at a market stall.
examples.zh: 他在市场的一个摊位上卖靴子。

examples.en: Another discovered a valuable diamond brooch covered in tar in a bathroom stall.
examples.zh: 另一个人在浴室的小隔间里发现了一个沾满柏油的珍贵钻石胸针。

examples.en: It would be futile to protest.
examples.zh: 抗议也无用。

examples.en: She composed a letter of protest.
examples.zh: 她写了一封抗议信。

examples.en: She is very sensitive by nature.
examples.zh: 她生性很敏感。

examples.en: You're far too sensitive.
examples.zh: 你也太敏感了。

examples.en: The classification based on DNA seems to be much more reliable.
examples.zh: 基于 DNA 的分类似乎更可靠。

examples.en: Chinese garbage classification policy has come into operation in several cities.
examples.zh: 中国垃圾分类政策已经在多个城市生效。

examples.en: Whose turn is it to brew up?
examples.zh: 该谁煮咖啡了？

examples.en: I thought I'd try the local brew.
examples.zh: 我想我还是尝尝本地的啤酒。

examples.en: The seat next to him was vacant.
examples.zh: 他旁边的座位空着。

examples.en: She had a kind of vacant look on her face.
examples.zh: 在她脸上有一种茫然的表情。

examples.en: They seem determined to menace the United States and its allies.
examples.zh: 他们好像决心要威胁美国及其盟国。

examples.en: Wildfires are becoming an increasing menace in the western United States, with Southern California being the hardest-hit area.
examples.zh: 森林大火对美国西部的威胁越来越大，其中南加州是受灾最严重的地区。

examples.en: He could barely afford the fare.
examples.zh: 他几乎付不起车费。

examples.en: I can't afford it at that price.
examples.zh: 这样的价格我付不起。

examples.en: The trial was stopped and the results declared invalid.
examples.zh: 审判被终止了，其结果被宣布无效。

examples.en: People with invalid papers are deported to another country.
examples.zh: 持无效证件的人被驱逐到别国。

examples.en: He muttered a curse at the other driver.
examples.zh: 他低声咒骂另一位开车的人。

examples.en: They see their failure to produce an heir as a curse from God.
examples.zh: 他们将自己未能生育一个后嗣看作是来自上帝的一个诅咒。

examples.en: Is his business strictly legitimate?
examples.zh: 他的生意是否绝对合法？

examples.en: The empire could not cohere as a legitimate whole.
examples.zh: 这个帝国无法凝聚成一个合法的整体。

examples.en: Gandhi was accused by some of trying to appease both factions of the electorate.
examples.zh: 甘地被一些人指责试图对两派选民都加以姑息。

examples.en: Children aren't born knowing how to say "I'm sorry"; rather, they learn over time that such statements appease parents and friends and their own consciences.
examples.zh: 孩子并不是生来就知道如何说“对不起”；相反，随着时间的推移，他们才明白这样的表达能安抚父母、朋友和自己的良心。

examples.en: Filter the curd through a sieve.
examples.zh: 用筛子过滤凝乳。

examples.en: Then filter the curd through a sieve.
examples.zh: 然后用筛子把豆腐过滤一下。

examples.en: They have introduced a new system whereby all employees must undergo regular training.
examples.zh: 他们采用了新的制度，所有的雇员都必须定期进行培训。

examples.en: The two colleges have a reciprocal arrangement whereby students from one college can attend classes at the other.
examples.zh: 两所学院有一项互惠协定，允许学生在院际间选课。

examples.en: The market situation is difficult to evaluate.
examples.zh: 市场形势难以评估。

examples.en: We need to learn how to evaluate them properly.
examples.zh: 我们需要学习如何正确地评估它们。

examples.en: Exotic pets are the latest status symbol.
examples.zh: 养珍禽异兽是表现社会地位的最时髦方式。

examples.en: The ads helped Nike to achieve iconic status.
examples.zh: 这些广告帮助耐克公司成就了偶像地位。

examples.en: They set the machinery in motion.
examples.zh: 他们将机器开动起来。

examples.en: There was a whirring of machinery.
examples.zh: 有机器发出的嗡嗡声。

examples.en: He clanged his sword three times on his shield.
examples.zh: 他用他的剑当当当地敲了3下盾。

examples.en: The gunman used the hostages as a human shield.
examples.zh: 持枪歹徒用人质作人体盾牌。

examples.en: She likes to skip rope as a warm-up.
examples.zh: 她喜欢以跳绳来热身。

examples.en: I often skip breakfast altogether.
examples.zh: 我常常干脆不吃早饭。

examples.en: Used in this way, intuition is an almost instantaneous cognitive process in which a manager recognizes familiar patterns.
examples.zh: 在这种情况下，直觉是管理者识别熟悉模式的瞬间认知过程。

examples.en: To a culture which has come to take instantaneous communication for granted, as part of the very structure of civilized life, this "time barrier" may have a profound psychological impact.
examples.zh: 对于一个将即时通讯视为文明生活结构一部分的文化来说，这种“时间障碍”可能会产生深远的心理影响。

examples.en: This phenomenon piqued Dr. Morris' interest.
examples.zh: 该现象引起莫里思博士的兴趣。

examples.en: Globalization is a phenomenon of the 21st century.
examples.zh: 全球化是21世纪的现象。

examples.en: Their quarterly meetings were anodyne affairs.
examples.zh: 他们的季度会议是平淡乏味的事情。

examples.en: A full listing of the companies will be published quarterly.
examples.zh: 公司名录大全每季度出版一次。

examples.en: Please notify us if the above is not correct.
examples.zh: 如果上面所说的不正确，请通知我们。

examples.en: The only course of action left to me was to notify her employer.
examples.zh: 我可能采取的唯一措施就是通知她的雇主。

examples.en: Listing 2 shows a sample XML document, bib.xml, which represents a bibliography of books.
examples.zh: 清单 2 显示了一个示例 XML 文档 bib.xml ，它表示书籍的书目。

examples.en: The Three Rules is a self-conscious contribution to this type of writing; it even includes a bibliography of "success studies".
examples.zh: 《三条规则》是对这类写作的自觉贡献；它甚至包括“成功研究”的参考书目。

examples.en: They jumped over the stream.
examples.zh: 他们跳过了小溪。

examples.en: The stream has dried up.
examples.zh: 小溪已经干涸了。

examples.en: A number of themes recur.
examples.zh: 许多主题重现。

examples.en: Recur at a specified time interval.
examples.zh: 按指定时间间隔重复发生。

examples.en: His policy risks fracturing the coalition.
examples.zh: 他的政策有分裂联盟的危险。

examples.en: Since June the country has had a coalition government.
examples.zh: 从6月起，这个国家有了一个联合政府。

examples.en: It would be foolish to generalize from a single example.
examples.zh: 仅从一个事例进行归纳的做法是愚蠢的。

examples.en: Critics love to generalize, to formulate trends into which all new work must be fitted, however contradictory.
examples.zh: 评论家喜欢概括，归纳出所有新作品都必须符合的趋势，不管它们是如何地不符。

examples.en: Lead can accumulate in the body until toxic levels are reached.
examples.zh: 铅可以在体内积聚直至到达有毒的程度。

examples.en: It was his ambition to accumulate a million dollars before he turned thirty.
examples.zh: 他的雄心是在30岁以前积攒100万美元。

examples.en: Crime has gone down 70 percent.
examples.zh: 犯罪率已下降了70%。

examples.en: Crime figures are rising rapidly.
examples.zh: 犯罪数字正在迅速上升。

examples.en: He might have been called the invulnerable dwarf of the fray.
examples.zh: 可以说，他是混战中的一个无懈可击的侏儒。

examples.en: This was not the best of it; for the dwarf said, "I know thee."
examples.zh: 这还不是最好的；因为小矮人说："我认识你。”

examples.en: The thought of it makes me heave.
examples.zh: 一想到那事我就恶心。

examples.en: The greasy food made her stomach heave.
examples.zh: 油腻腻的食物让她胃里恶心。

examples.en: Leisure is often defined in opposition to work.
examples.zh: 休闲常被定义为工作的反面。

examples.en: Whale-watching has become a growth leisure industry.
examples.zh: 观鲸业已成为一个快速发展的休闲产业。

examples.en: As Tony says, "Depression strips you of any desire to nourish yourself, in any form."
examples.zh: 正如托尼所说，“抑郁会以任何形式剥夺任何滋养你的欲望。”

examples.en: Warm porridge could help increase one's personal heat and nourish the body in cold weather.
examples.zh: 在寒冷的天气里，温热的粥可以暖和身子，滋养身体。

examples.en: He could smell the bacon grease.
examples.zh: 他闻到了一股熏肉的油脂味儿。

examples.en: His dungarees were covered in grease.
examples.zh: 他的工装裤上沾满了油污。

examples.en: The claimants allege that manufacturers failed to warn doctors that their drugs should be used only in limited circumstances.
examples.zh: 索赔人声称生产商没有警告医生他们生产的药品只能在特定的条件下使用。

examples.en: The court papers allege she may be a voyeur.
examples.zh: 法庭文件宣称她可能是一个偷窥狂。

examples.en: Pledging to run Pilgrim safely, the company has applied for federal permission to keep it open for another 20 years.
examples.zh: 为了保证 Pilgrim 的安全运营，该公司已经向联邦政府申请了继续运营20年的许可。

examples.en: Their family goes back to the time of the Pilgrim Fathers.
examples.zh: 他们家族的渊源可追溯到清教徒前辈移民时代。

examples.en: Stress may act as a trigger for these illnesses.
examples.zh: 压力也许是引发这些疾病的一个原因。

examples.en: Nuts can trigger off a violent allergic reaction.
examples.zh: 坚果可以引起严重的过敏反应。

examples.en: There is every sign that new Asian-Americans are just as willing to assimilate.
examples.zh: 各种迹象表明新的亚裔美籍人简直一样愿意被同化。

examples.en: China needs to assimilate a good deal of foreign progressive culture, but she must not swallow anything and everything uncritically.
examples.zh: 中国需要大量吸收外国的进步文化，但决不能无批判地兼收并蓄。

examples.en: I adopted a positive outlook on life.
examples.zh: 我选择了一种积极的人生观。

examples.en: The athlete tested positive for steroids.
examples.zh: 这个运动员类固醇检测呈阳性。

examples.en: A large detachment of police was used to segregate the two rival camps of protesters.
examples.zh: 一大队分遣警察被派来隔离两群敌对的抗议者。

examples.en: HTML head and body tags segregate your document into sections.
examples.zh: HTML head和body标记将文档分为不同的部分。

examples.en: She is a TV addict and watches as much as she can.
examples.zh: 她是一个电视迷，看尽可能多的电视。

examples.en: Naylor acknowledged, in a letter to the judge, that he was a drug addict.
examples.zh: 在一封写给法官的信中，内勒承认他是一个吸毒者。

examples.en: The prospect of civil war is very real.
examples.zh: 内战爆发的可能性确实存在。

examples.en: There is no immediate prospect of peace.
examples.zh: 短期内没有和平的可能。

examples.en: It's never wise to withhold evidence.
examples.zh: 隐瞒证据绝不明智。

examples.en: It can be inferred that Facebook is self-enhancer's paradise because people can withhold their unflattering sides.
examples.zh: 可以推断，Facebook 是自我增强者的天堂，因为人们可以保留自己不讨喜的一面。

examples.en: By contrast, the comparable figure for Canada is 16 percent.
examples.zh: 对比之下，加拿大的可比数字是16%。

examples.en: In other comparable countries, real wages increased much more rapidly.
examples.zh: 在其他可比的国家里实际工资增长快得多。

examples.en: They were gossipy and not always discreet.
examples.zh: 他们爱说闲话，而且不总是言语谨慎。

examples.en: Emporio Armani, the Italian fashion house, has made a discreet foray into furnishings.
examples.zh: 意大利时装公司恩波利·阿玛尼已谨慎地涉足室内装饰业。

examples.en: We specialize in quality furniture.
examples.zh: 我们专营高档家具。

examples.en: Most of the staff specialize in the care of children.
examples.zh: 大部分员工都擅长照顾孩子。

examples.en: Can you quote me an instance of when this happened?
examples.zh: 你能否给我举例说明一下发生这事的情况？

examples.en: What would you do, for instance, if you found a member of staff stealing?
examples.zh: 比如说，如果你发现有职员偷东西，你会怎么办？

examples.en: I couldn't concentrate, presumably because I was so tired.
examples.zh: 我的精神集中不起来，大概是太累了吧。

examples.en: Presumably you'll be given moving expenses from the Portugal job.
examples.zh: 大概你会从葡萄牙的工作中得到搬家的费用。

examples.en: She was rewarded for her efforts with a cash bonus.
examples.zh: 她因自己所作的努力而得到一笔奖金。

examples.en: Bonus notices were issued each year from head office to local agents.
examples.zh: 红利通告每年由总公司发给各地方代理商。

examples.en: She gained only minimal recognition for her work.
examples.zh: 她的工作仅仅得到极少的赞誉。

examples.en: Her unusual talent gained her worldwide recognition.
examples.zh: 她非凡的才能举世公认。

examples.en: He was arranging floral centrepieces in the banquet hall.
examples.zh: 他正在宴会大厅摆放餐桌中央的装饰花束。

examples.en: There's a banquet for you!
examples.zh: 这是为你准备的宴会！

examples.en: She gets an obvious thrill out of performing.
examples.zh: 她显然从表演中得到一种兴奋感。

examples.en: I can remember the thrill of not knowing what I would get on Christmas morning.
examples.zh: 我记得，在不知道圣诞节早上会收到何种礼物时自己的激动心情。

examples.en: Coffee and tea are in the next aisle.
examples.zh: 咖啡和茶在下一个走道处。

examples.en: The aisle was floored with ancient bricks.
examples.zh: 过道由古旧的砖块铺就。
