examples.en: The UN had the foresight to convene a "world assembly on ageing" back in 1982, but that came and went.
examples.zh: 联合国早在1982年就有远见地召开了“老龄化问题世界大会”，但后来还是不了了之。

examples.en: The committee will convene at 11.30 next Thursday.
examples.zh: 委员会将在下星期四上午11:30开会。

examples.en: That arrangement suits me fine.
examples.zh: 那种安排对我很合适。

examples.en: Visits are by prior arrangement.
examples.zh: 参观需要事先安排。

examples.en: If they overestimate, they lose revenue.
examples.zh: 如果他们过高地估算，就会损失收入。

examples.en: This contract represents 20% of the company's annual revenue.
examples.zh: 这份合约相当于公司20%的年收入。

examples.en: Do you have a better solution?
examples.zh: 你有更好的解决办法吗？

examples.en: A solution proffered itself.
examples.zh: 一个解答自然出现了。

examples.en: Had he succeeded, he would have acquired a monopoly.
examples.zh: 如果他那时成功了，他就会获得垄断地位。

examples.en: The company has a virtual monopoly in this area of trade.
examples.zh: 这家公司实质上已经垄断了这种贸易。

examples.en: The boxer jabbed at his opponent.
examples.zh: 拳击手向对手猛击。

examples.en: In debate he was a formidable opponent.
examples.zh: 在辩论中他是位难应付的对手。

examples.en: Inflation continues to accelerate.
examples.zh: 通货膨胀不断加速。

examples.en: Growth will accelerate to 2.9 percent next year.
examples.zh: 增长明年将加快到2.9%。

examples.en: Its designers were not high-end with supplementary lines.
examples.zh: 它的设计师们不是高端产品的补充线。

examples.en: Only rarely are supplementary worksheets distributed in a maths class.
examples.zh: 只有在很少的情况下，才会在数学课上发放补充作业纸。

examples.en: Surplus grain is being sold for export.
examples.zh: 过剩的谷物正销往国外。

examples.en: Any shortage could push up grain prices.
examples.zh: 任何短缺都会推动粮价上涨。

examples.en: Does the hotel take credit cards?
examples.zh: 这家旅馆接受信用卡付款吗？

examples.en: She was charged with credit card fraud.
examples.zh: 她被控告信用卡欺骗罪。

examples.en: Oxygen has high reactivity.
examples.zh: 氧的反应性很高。

examples.en: All life depends ultimately on oxygen.
examples.zh: 一切生命归根到底都要依赖氧气。

examples.en: Ahead of us lay ten days of intensive training.
examples.zh: 我们还要进行十天的强化训练。

examples.en: Intensive cultivation has impoverished the soil.
examples.zh: 集约耕作使土壤变得贫瘠。

examples.en: It doesn't alter the way I feel.
examples.zh: 这并没有改变我的感受。

examples.en: He is unlikely to alter his game plan.
examples.zh: 他不太可能改变他的策略。

examples.en: The trip will combine business with pleasure.
examples.zh: 此次旅行将把出差和娱乐结合起来。

examples.en: The combine had cut a swathe around the edge of the field.
examples.zh: 联合收割机把庄稼绕田边割了一长条。

examples.en: He has found his ideal mate.
examples.zh: 他已经找到了理想的配偶。

examples.en: We do not live in an ideal world.
examples.zh: 我们并非生活在一个完美的世界里。

examples.en: When exactly did the incident occur?
examples.zh: 这一事件究竟是什么时候发生的？

examples.en: These snails do not occur on low-lying coral islands.
examples.zh: 这些蜗牛不会出现在低洼的珊瑚岛上。

examples.en: Let me illustrate what I mean with an old story.
examples.zh: 让我用一个老故事来说明我指的是什么吧。

examples.en: One example will suffice to illustrate the point.
examples.zh: 举一个例子就足以说明这一点。

examples.en: You've left the garden hose on.
examples.zh: 你没有关花园的水管。

examples.en: Mrs. Morrell reached for a loop of garden hose.
examples.zh: 莫雷尔夫人伸手去拿一圈橡胶软管。

examples.en: The evidence provided by the documents of British and French colonies is not definitive.
examples.zh: 英国和法国殖民地的文件所提供的证据并不是决定性的。

examples.en: Models from economics and demography become the definitive tools for examining the financial base of social security.
examples.zh: 来自经济学和人口学的模型成为检验社会保障财政基础的最权威工具。

examples.en: His record reveals a tough streak.
examples.zh: 他的经历说明他个性坚强。

examples.en: He has always had a rebellious streak.
examples.zh: 他总是有点倔强。

examples.en: Can you work under pressure?
examples.zh: 你能在压力下工作吗？

examples.en: The pressure now was relentless.
examples.zh: 压力现在毫无减弱之意。

examples.en: I have to go to the dentist tomorrow.
examples.zh: 我明天得去看牙医。

examples.en: The dentist scaled and polished my teeth.
examples.zh: 牙医为我刮除牙石，抛光了牙齿。

examples.en: Where did the rest of the brood fly to?
examples.zh: 一窝中其他的飞到哪儿去了?

examples.en: Nor does it explain why, in a species where one parent determines handedness, a brood is not exclusively right-or left-handed when the offspring would have the same genetic predisposition.
examples.zh: 这也不能解释为什么在一个由父母一方决定用利手的物种中，当后代具有相同的遗传倾向时，他们并非完全是右撇子或左撇子。

examples.en: Many adults have problems with literacy and numeracy.
examples.zh: 很多成年人有读写和计算的困难。

examples.en: Of course, literacy isn't the same thing as intelligence.
examples.zh: 当然，识字与智力不是一回事。

examples.en: All carbohydrates originate from plants.
examples.zh: 所有的碳水化合物均来源于植物。

examples.en: Current services originate in two key measures.
examples.zh: 当前的服务起源于两个关键措施。

examples.en: My doctor referred me to a specialist.
examples.zh: 我的医生让我去找一位专家诊治。

examples.en: A specialist has now pronounced him fully fit.
examples.zh: 一位专家已宣布他完全康复了。

examples.en: Her background militates against her.
examples.zh: 她的背景妨碍了她。

examples.en: In the background was that eternal hum.
examples.zh: 背景里是那没完没了的哼哼声。

examples.en: By the time he died, he was a millionaire.
examples.zh: 到他去世的时候，他已是一位百万富翁。

examples.en: Take it from me—he'll be a millionaire before he's 30.
examples.zh: 不信你等着瞧，他到不了30岁就会成为百万富翁。

examples.en: The contents of the package may have settled in transit.
examples.zh: 包裹里的东西可能在运输途中摇密实了。

examples.en: During their talks, the two presidents discussed the transit of goods between the two countries.
examples.zh: 在会谈中，两位总统讨论了两国之间货物的运输。

examples.en: Most adolescent problems are temporary.
examples.zh: 多数青春期的问题都是暂时的。

examples.en: He was showing off, as is the way with adolescent boys.
examples.zh: 他在炫耀，青春期的男孩都是这个样子。

examples.en: Nonetheless, it's smart to exercise caution.
examples.zh: 尽管如此，保持谨慎是明智的。

examples.en: But it's remarkable for all that, nonetheless.
examples.zh: 尽管如此，这还是很了不起的。

examples.en: Obviously we ask all our customers to dispose of litter responsibly.
examples.zh: 显然，我们要求所有的顾客负责任地处理垃圾。

examples.en: Agencies and companies throughout the world are working on developing technology that would dispose of or capture space debris before it causes serious damage.
examples.zh: 世界各地的机构和公司都在致力于开发一种技术，可以在太空垃圾造成严重损害之前将其处理或捕获。

examples.en: How could you be so petty?
examples.zh: 你怎么那么小气呢？

examples.en: She felt boxed in by all their petty rules.
examples.zh: 她觉得被他们的琐碎规章束缚住了手脚。

examples.en: The fresh air had brought a healthy glow to her cheeks.
examples.zh: 新鲜空气使她两颊红润、精神焕发。

examples.en: There was no light except for the occasional glow of a cigarette.
examples.zh: 除偶尔有香烟的微弱红光外没有一点亮光。

examples.en: With the last sentiment, Arnold was in hearty agreement.
examples.zh: 对于最后一个观点，阿诺德强烈赞同。

examples.en: He has illustrated this sentiment thoroughly in a drama.
examples.zh: 他在一出戏剧里充分地表现了这种感情。

examples.en: There was little task differentiation.
examples.zh: 任务分化很少。

examples.en: They also had to create product differentiation.
examples.zh: 他们还必须创造产品差异化。

examples.en: A new constitution was promulgated last month.
examples.zh: 上个月颁布了一部新宪法。

examples.en: The assembly was mandated to draft a constitution.
examples.zh: 大会被授权起草一份章程。

examples.en: The device was protected by patent.
examples.zh: 这一装置受专利保护。

examples.en: P&G applied for a patent on its cookies.
examples.zh: 宝洁公司为其饼干申请了专利。

examples.en: Crack is a highly potent and addictive derivative of cocaine.
examples.zh: 强效纯可卡因是一种药效极强、容易使人上瘾的可卡因制剂。

examples.en: Cocaine addicts get specialized support from knowledgeable staff.
examples.zh: 可卡因上瘾者从知识丰富的人员那里得到专业化的帮助。

examples.en: The cupboard door slides open along the groove.
examples.zh: 食橱门沿槽移开。

examples.en: We are all unique, so we have to find our own groove and start listening to ourselves.
examples.zh: 我们都是独一无二的，所以我们必须找到自己的最佳状态，然后听从自己的。

examples.en: The Canada lynx shows a ten-year cycle of abundance that parallels the abundance cycle of hares.
examples.zh: 加拿大猞猁的丰饶周期为10年，与野兔的丰饶周期相似。

examples.en: Fruit and vegetables grew in abundance on the island.
examples.zh: 该岛盛产水果和蔬菜。

examples.en: This tennis racket absorbs shock on impact.
examples.zh: 这个网球拍能减轻撞击所产生的剧烈震动。

examples.en: She swished her racket aggressively through the air.
examples.zh: 她咄咄逼人地把球拍挥舞得呼呼作响。

examples.en: She is unable to conceive.
examples.zh: 她不能怀孕。

examples.en: Women, he says, should give up alcohol before they plan to conceive.
examples.zh: 他说女人在计划怀孕前应该戒酒。

examples.en: The heat turned the milk sour.
examples.zh: 炎热的天气使得牛奶变酸了。

examples.en: Too much pulp produces a sour wine.
examples.zh: 过多的果肉会让酒变酸。

examples.en: It was an event that would transform my life.
examples.zh: 那是能够彻底改变我一生的一件事。

examples.en: She actually wanted to reconstruct the state and transform society.
examples.zh: 她其实想改造这个国家并完全改变社会。

examples.en: Her father cleaned his glasses with a paper napkin.
examples.zh: 她父亲用一张餐巾纸擦他的眼镜。

examples.en: He picked the napkin from his lap and placed it alongside his plate.
examples.zh: 他从腿上拿起餐巾，放在他的盘子旁边。

examples.en: She was a good rider, but reckless.
examples.zh: 她是个好骑手，但太鲁莽。

examples.en: He showed a reckless disregard for his own safety.
examples.zh: 他对个人安危全然无所顾忌。

examples.en: The story contains many levels of paradox.
examples.zh: 这个故事包含很多层面的悖论。

examples.en: He was a paradox—a loner who loved to chat to strangers.
examples.zh: 他真是个矛盾人物，生性孤僻却又喜欢和陌生人闲聊。

examples.en: We did not realize the magnitude of the problem.
examples.zh: 我们没有意识到这个问题的重要性。

examples.en: America and Russia do not face a problem of the same order of magnitude as Japan.
examples.zh: 美俄两国没有面临与日本同样的重要级别的问题。

examples.en: His justification for the merger was just hot air.
examples.zh: 他提出的合并理由只是连篇空话。

examples.en: All I can say in justification of her actions is that she was under a lot of pressure at work.
examples.zh: 我唯一能为她的行为辩解的理由是她工作压力很大。

examples.en: Only genuine refugees can apply for asylum.
examples.zh: 只有真正的难民才能申请政治避难。

examples.en: This isn't a genuine antique—you've been done.
examples.zh: 这不是真正的古董—你上当了。

examples.en: The idea was good, but the execution was poor.
examples.zh: 这个主意倒不错，可实施情况不理想。

examples.en: He was arrested for obstruction of a police officer in the execution of his duty.
examples.zh: 他因妨碍警察执行公务而被逮捕。

examples.en: Adults are often immune to German measles.
examples.zh: 成人往往对风疹有免疫力。

examples.en: Our immune systems are killing billions of germs right now.
examples.zh: 我们的免疫系统正在杀死数以十亿计的细菌。

examples.en: Our new brochure is crammed full of inspirational ideas.
examples.zh: 我们新的小册子中振奋人心的妙计比比皆是。

examples.en: Our brochure is printed on environmentally-friendly paper.
examples.zh: 我们的宣传手册是用环保纸印刷的。

examples.en: He cast a stern glance at the two men.
examples.zh: 他严厉地瞪了那两名男子一眼。

examples.en: Her voice was stern.
examples.zh: 她声调严厉。

examples.en: Invented in 1951, the rotary engine is a revolutionary concept in internal combustion.
examples.zh: 1951年发明的旋转引擎是内燃领域的一个革命性观念。

examples.en: It's like a rotary phone, where you could turn to a pageboy, or that haircut that looked like a nuclear bomb exploded your bangs, and then the Peter Pan look.
examples.zh: 就像个旋转式电话，在那儿你能做个童花头，或者是爆炸式的刘海，再或者一个彼得潘的发型也行。

examples.en: Common salt is a compound of sodium and chlorine.
examples.zh: 普通食盐是钠和氯的化合物。

examples.en: A compound sentence contains two or more clauses.
examples.zh: 复合句包含两个或多个从句。

examples.en: Running on a variety of phones, Dub lets you swap business cards electronically, even with people who don't use the service.
examples.zh: Dub 可以在多种手机上运行，让你可以通过电子方式交换名片，甚至可以与不使用这项服务的人交换名片。

examples.en: We have two main cafeterias, the Ratty and the V-Dub, which are on opposite sides, South and North.
examples.zh: 我们有两个主要的食堂，一个叫 Ratty，一个叫 V-Dub，两个食堂在相反的方位，一个在南边，一个在北边。

examples.en: 'He' and 'him' are masculine pronouns.
examples.zh: he和him都是阳性代词。

examples.en: The French word for 'sun' is masculine.
examples.zh: 法语单词“太阳”是阳性的。

examples.en: She is a designer of extraordinary versatility.
examples.zh: 她是位特别多才多艺的设计师。

examples.en: His behaviour was extraordinary and inexplicable.
examples.zh: 他的行为离奇且令人费解。

examples.en: He took the stand as the first witness.
examples.zh: 他第一个出庭作证。

examples.en: He has been witness to a terrible murder.
examples.zh: 他目击了一起残忍的凶杀事件。

examples.en: Biofuels can be mixed with conventional fuels.
examples.zh: 生物燃料能够和传统燃料混合。

examples.en: It's taken a long time to break out of my own conventional training.
examples.zh: 摆脱我自己的传统训练花了很长一段时间。

examples.en: The regulation operates in favour of married couples.
examples.zh: 这一规定的实施有利于已婚夫妇。

examples.en: Some in the market now want government regulation in order to reduce costs.
examples.zh: 市场上现在有人想要政府来管理以降低成本。

examples.en: The building does not conform with safety regulations.
examples.zh: 这座建筑物不符合安全条例。

examples.en: The lamp has been designed to conform to new safety standards.
examples.zh: 该灯设计得符合新的安全标准。

examples.en: The coins were taken out of circulation.
examples.zh: 这种硬币已停止流通。

examples.en: The paper's circulation continues to climb.
examples.zh: 这份报纸的发行量在继续增长。

examples.en: She has authentic charm whereas most people simply have nice manners.
examples.zh: 她有真正的魅力，而大多数人只是有礼貌而已。

examples.en: Authentic Italian cooking is very healthy—witness the low incidence of heart disease in Italy.
examples.zh: 正宗的意大利烹饪对健康非常有益，在意大利心脏病发病率低就是证据。

examples.en: He seemed so young, a mere boy.
examples.zh: 他看来那么年轻，只是个孩子。

examples.en: $1 000 is a mere trifle to her.
examples.zh: 1 000元对她来说不过是区区小数。

examples.en: She left out an 'm' in 'accommodation'.
examples.zh: 她在accommodation一词中漏掉了一个字母m。

examples.en: The accommodation is simple but spacious.
examples.zh: 住处简朴但宽敞。

examples.en: The threat of inflation is already evident in bond prices.
examples.zh: 通货膨胀的威胁在证券价格上已经是明显可见的。

examples.en: It was evident that someone had gone through my possessions.
examples.zh: 显然有人翻过我的物品。

examples.en: They live in a wealthy suburb of Chicago.
examples.zh: 他们住在芝加哥郊区的一处富人区。

examples.en: Anna was born in 1923 in a suburb of Philadelphia.
examples.zh: 安娜1923年出生在费城市郊。

examples.en: Pumpkin pie is a traditional American dish served on Thanksgiving.
examples.zh: 南瓜馅饼是美国传统的感恩节食物。

examples.en: Let's make a pumpkin lantern!
examples.zh: 我们来做个南瓜灯吧！

examples.en: Does it annoy you if others don't seem to try hard enough?
examples.zh: 如果其他人做得似乎不够努力，这会使你烦恼吗？

examples.en: They incidentally annoy their friends.
examples.zh: 他们无意间惹恼了他们的朋友。

examples.en: Why do organizations profess that they care?
examples.zh: 为什么一些组织声称他们关心呢？

examples.en: I don't profess to be an expert in this subject.
examples.zh: 我不敢自诩为这方面的专家。

examples.en: The problem was psychological rather than physiological.
examples.zh: 这是个心理而不是生理问题。

examples.en: Lack of confidence is a psychological barrier to success.
examples.zh: 缺乏信心是阻碍成功的心理因素。

examples.en: Her claims seem credible to many.
examples.zh: 她的说法似乎在许多人看来是可信的。

examples.en: Alternatives provide a credible threat to suppliers, even if the ability to switch is constrained.
examples.zh: 替代方案对供应商构成了可靠的威胁，即使转换的能力受到限制。

examples.en: There is no empirical evidence to support his thesis.
examples.zh: 没有实证根据来支持他的论点。

examples.en: The empirical evidence considered here is subject to many qualifications.
examples.zh: 这里所考虑的经验证据有许多限制条件。

examples.en: He won't commit.
examples.zh: 他不会承诺。

examples.en: He hit out at public figures who commit adultery.
examples.zh: 他猛烈抨击犯通奸的公众人物。

examples.en: He needs to learn to curb his temper.
examples.zh: 他得学着控制自己的脾气。

examples.en: It's easier to pick up apples than to drag tree branches all the way to the curb.
examples.zh: 摘苹果比把树枝一直拖到路边要容易得多。

examples.en: We're going to crash, aren't we?
examples.zh: 我们要坠毁了，是不是？

examples.en: He escaped from the crash unhurt.
examples.zh: 他平安逃过了这场车祸。

examples.en: She's a good judge of character.
examples.zh: 她很善于鉴定别人的性格。

examples.en: I'm a pretty good judge of character.
examples.zh: 我非常善于判别性格。

examples.en: We should all give ourselves time to reflect.
examples.zh: 我们都应该给自己时间来深思。

examples.en: The third-quarter results reflect continued improvements in productivity.
examples.zh: 第三季度的结果反映了生产率的持续提高。

examples.en: She was wearing an outfit she'd bought the previous day.
examples.zh: 她穿着前一天买的一套服装。

examples.en: Her stage outfit of hot trousers, over-the-knee boots and a tube top was a bit much.
examples.zh: 她在舞台上的装扮是热裤、过膝长靴加紧身抹胸，太过分了。

examples.en: His contribution could be key.
examples.zh: 他的贡献可能是最重要的。

examples.en: Their contribution was of great worth.
examples.zh: 他们的贡献具有伟大的意义。

examples.en: When Pemberton created his drink, it represented an ongoing trend.
examples.zh: 当彭伯顿发明他的饮料时，它代表了一种持续的趋势。

examples.en: They were also more likely to have an ongoing medical condition and be overweight.
examples.zh: 他们也更有可能出现持续的病症和超重问题。

examples.en: Banks are built to look solid to reassure their customers.
examples.zh: 银行修建得看上去很坚固，以使顾客放心。

examples.en: He didn't need to go to hospital, but he went just to reassure himself.
examples.zh: 他用不着去医院，去了只是想让自己放心点。（北美英语）

examples.en: Suddenly there was a loud bang.
examples.zh: 突然发出砰的一声巨响。

examples.en: Bang and pop are onomatopoeic words.
examples.zh: bang和pop是拟声词。

examples.en: The mineral is weakly magnetic.
examples.zh: 这种矿石有轻微的磁性。

examples.en: Magnetic coils focus the electron beams into fine spots.
examples.zh: 磁线圈将电子束聚焦成细小的点。

examples.en: Only the yolk contains cholesterol.
examples.zh: 只有蛋黄含胆固醇。

examples.en: I reasoned that changing my diet would lower my cholesterol level.
examples.zh: 我推断改变我的饮食会降低我的胆固醇水平。

examples.en: The two spacecraft will link up in orbit.
examples.zh: 两艘宇宙飞船将在轨道上对接。

examples.en: The orbit of this comet intersects the orbit of the Earth.
examples.zh: 这颗彗星的轨道和地球的轨道相交。

examples.en: The singer re-formed his band.
examples.zh: 这名歌手对他的乐队进行了重组。

examples.en: There was a naff band playing.
examples.zh: 有一支蹩脚的乐队在演奏。

examples.en: The company says the cost of relocation will be negligible.
examples.zh: 公司说迁移的费用微不足道。

examples.en: Its influence was rather negligible.
examples.zh: 它的影响是相当微不足道的。

examples.en: It is an unexpected setback in her fortunes.
examples.zh: 这是她好运中的一次意外的挫折。

examples.en: A further reduction in local supplies is yet another unwelcome setback to the industry.
examples.zh: 对该行业来说，本地供应的进一步减少又是一个不受欢迎的挫折。

examples.en: Local resident groups have united in opposition to the plan.
examples.zh: 当地居民团体已联合起来反对这项计划。

examples.en: They cover preventative care for the local resident.
examples.zh: 他们为当地居民提供预防保健服务。

examples.en: The dove is symbolic of peace.
examples.zh: 鸽子是和平的象征。

examples.en: Yellow clothes are worn as symbolic of spring.
examples.zh: 黄色衣服被穿着来象征春天。

examples.en: Could he distinguish right from wrong?
examples.zh: 他能辨别是非吗？

examples.en: It's important to distinguish fact from fiction.
examples.zh: 区别真实和虚构是重要的。

examples.en: The local kids hang out at the mall.
examples.zh: 当地的孩子常在商场闲荡。

examples.en: Let's go to the mall.
examples.zh: 我们去商场吧。

examples.en: Switch from one module to another.
examples.zh: 从一个模块转换到另一个模块。

examples.en: Go download the module and get started.
examples.zh: 去下载这个模块，然后开始。

examples.en: They listened to the howl of the wind through the trees.
examples.zh: 他们听着风在林间呼啸的声音。

examples.en: He sprang up with a howl.
examples.zh: 他嚎叫着跳了起来。

examples.en: We are going to execute our campaign plan to the letter.
examples.zh: 我们将严格执行我们的竞选方案。

examples.en: We execute that instruction and we move to the next one.
examples.zh: 我们执行那个指令，并继续下一轮。

examples.en: He made substantial donations to charity.
examples.zh: 他做了大量的慈善捐赠。

examples.en: They are making substantial claims for improved working conditions.
examples.zh: 他们就改善工作条件提出了实质性要求。

examples.en: I've had the benefit of a good education.
examples.zh: 我得益于受过良好教育。

examples.en: I might benefit from getting my teeth fixed.
examples.zh: 把牙齿补好可能对我有好处。

examples.en: He came barreling down the hill and smashed into a phone booth.
examples.zh: 他沿山坡飞驰下来，撞在了一个电话亭上。

examples.en: In the next booth he could see an elderly lady, talking volubly.
examples.zh: 在隔壁的电话亭里，他看见一个上了年纪的妇女在滔滔不绝地说着。

examples.en: He is an enthusiastic skier.
examples.zh: 他是个热情的滑雪爱好者。

examples.en: Her greeting was less than enthusiastic.
examples.zh: 她打招呼根本不热情。

examples.en: If word got out now, a scandal could be disastrous.
examples.zh: 如果现在泄露消息，丑闻可能会是灾难性的。

examples.en: He believed that the policies were both wrong and electorally disastrous.
examples.zh: 他认为这些政策既是错误的、又是选举上的灾难。

examples.en: Each person's signature is unique.
examples.zh: 每个人的签名是独一无二的。

examples.en: Everyone's fingerprints are unique.
examples.zh: 每个人的指纹都是独一无二的。

examples.en: America sent cotton to England for processing.
examples.zh: 美国把棉花运到英格兰加工。

examples.en: Nitrates are used as preservatives in food processing.
examples.zh: 硝酸盐在食品加工中被用作防腐剂。

examples.en: We need a big win to boost our confidence.
examples.zh: 我们需要一个大的胜利来增强我们的自信心。

examples.en: The tax cuts will give a much needed boost to the economy.
examples.zh: 减税将给经济带来迫切需要的推动力。

examples.en: Unable to resist the impulse, he glanced at the sea again.
examples.zh: 他抑制不住冲动，又看了一眼大海。

examples.en: I resisted the impulse to laugh.
examples.zh: 我强忍着没有笑出来。

examples.en: He'd been drunk when I arrived. Now he was sober.
examples.zh: 我到的时候他已经喝醉了。现在他清醒了。

examples.en: I thought I'd got sober.
examples.zh: 我以为我清醒了。

examples.en: Don't stir or the sugar will crystallize.
examples.zh: 不要搅，否则糖会结晶的。

examples.en: Our ideas began to crystallize into a definite plan.
examples.zh: 我们的想法开始形成了一个明确的计划。

examples.en: He deplored religious bigotry.
examples.zh: 他谴责了宗教偏执的行为。

examples.en: His wife is very religious.
examples.zh: 她的妻子非常虔诚。

examples.en: Flu is highly infectious.
examples.zh: 流感的传染性很高。

examples.en: I'm still infectious.
examples.zh: 我还处在传染期。

examples.en: They provided food and shelter for the poor.
examples.zh: 他们为贫困者提供食物和住所。

examples.en: They have dragged themselves thither for shelter.
examples.zh: 他们费力地挪到那边躲避。

examples.en: He had an angular face with prominent cheekbones.
examples.zh: 他有一张颧骨突出、棱角分明的脸。

examples.en: He went on to earn a prominent professorial position.
examples.zh: 他接着得到了一个著名的教授职位。

examples.en: The heart muscles contract to expel the blood.
examples.zh: 心脏肌肉收缩以挤压出血液。

examples.en: Cultivating positive interpersonal relationships helped him expel solitary feelings.
examples.zh: 培养积极的人际关系有助于他排除孤独感。

examples.en: We have air superiority.
examples.zh: 我们有空中优势。

examples.en: He had a well-developed sense of his own superiority.
examples.zh: 他的个人优越感十足。

examples.en: Decide at the outset what kind of learning programme you want to follow.
examples.zh: 一开始就要定下你的学习计划。

examples.en: I never understood why he didn't just accede to our demands at the outset.
examples.zh: 我从不能理解为什么他不一开始就答应我们的请求。

examples.en: Most oceanic islands are similar to one another in latitude and contain plants and animals typical of tropical islands.
examples.zh: 大多数海洋岛屿彼此都纬度相近，并且都有热带岛屿典型的动植物。

examples.en: This is because middle- and upper- latitude timberlines are strongly influenced by the duration and depth of the snow cover.
examples.zh: 这是因为中纬度和高纬度地区的林木线受到积雪存留时间和厚度的强烈影响。

examples.en: A brain scan revealed the blood clot.
examples.zh: 脑部扫描检查发现了那个血块。

examples.en: Not all ISPs are equipped to scan for viruses.
examples.zh: 并非所有的因特网服务供应商都有装备来扫描病毒。

examples.en: He has now become one of the patrons of the association.
examples.zh: 他如今已成为该协会的名誉赞助人之一。

examples.en: The trade association promotes ethical business practices.
examples.zh: 这个贸易协会提倡合乎道德标准的商业行为。

examples.en: Hard work is fundamental to success.
examples.zh: 勤奋工作是成功的基础。

examples.en: The argument is full of fundamental flaws.
examples.zh: 这段论述充满根本性的错误。

examples.en: This diet claims to eliminate toxins from the body.
examples.zh: 这种饮食据称具有排除体内毒素的作用。

examples.en: We called up three economists to ask how to eliminate the deficit and they obliged with very straightforward answers.
examples.zh: 我们致电3位经济学家咨询消除赤字的方法，他们满足了我们的要求，给出了非常直接的答复。

examples.en: Shame, she's so cute!
examples.zh: 哇，她简直是太漂亮了！

examples.en: Isn't she cute?
examples.zh: 它是不是很可爱？

examples.en: This ticket does not entitle you to travel first class.
examples.zh: 你拿这张票不能坐头等舱。

examples.en: If the warranty is limited, the terms may entitle you to a replacement or refund.
examples.zh: 如果保修单有限制，这些条款可让你有权换货或退款。

examples.en: She drew the figures in outline.
examples.zh: 她简略地勾勒出人物的轮廓。

examples.en: Trees soften the outline of the house.
examples.zh: 树木使房子的轮廓显得柔和。

examples.en: For example, DB2 supports massively parallel processing (MPP) architecture and can run on a single partition (EE) or multiple partitions (EEE).
examples.zh: 例如， DB2 支持大规模并行处理（MPP）构件，并能在单个分区（EE）或者多个分区（EEE）上运行。

examples.en: The uncle had made a wooden partition here for the goats, and covered the floor with straw.
examples.zh: 叔叔在这里为山羊做了一个木隔板，并把稻草铺在地板上。

examples.en: We only pay a nominal rent.
examples.zh: 我们只象征性地付一点租金。

examples.en: I am prepared to sell my shares at a nominal price.
examples.zh: 我准备以低价卖掉我的股票。

examples.en: Excess food is stored as fat.
examples.zh: 多余的食物作为脂肪贮存起来。

examples.en: In an excess of enthusiasm I agreed to work late.
examples.zh: 我一时热情过度答应了工作到很晚。

examples.en: She shot him an angry glance.
examples.zh: 她很生气，瞪了他一眼。

examples.en: She shot him a sideways glance.
examples.zh: 她从眼角瞥了他一眼。

examples.en: In his art he broke the laws of scientific linear perspective.
examples.zh: 他在自己的绘画艺术中打破了科学的直线透视法规律。

examples.en: I let things get out of perspective.
examples.zh: 我没能正确地看待事物。

examples.en: The Galaxy consists of 100 billion stars.
examples.zh: 银河系由1千亿颗恒星组成。

examples.en: Astronomers have discovered a distant galaxy.
examples.zh: 天文学家们发现了一个遥远的星系。

examples.en: All our activities are premised on the basis of "Quality with Equality."
examples.zh: 我们所有活动都是以“优质、平等”为基本前提的。

examples.en: Zach insists that he is but one among many who are fighting for equality.
examples.zh: 扎克坚持认为他仅仅是许多为平等而战的人们中的一个。

examples.en: In the poem he laments the destruction of the countryside.
examples.zh: 在那首诗里他对乡村遭到的破坏流露出悲哀。

examples.en: It is vital that we act to stop the destruction of the rainforests.
examples.zh: 至关紧要的是，我们应当采取行动制止破坏雨林。

examples.en: They hadn't reckoned on a rebellion.
examples.zh: 他们没有料到会发生叛乱。

examples.en: It roused a feeling of rebellion in him.
examples.zh: 这激起了他的叛逆感。

examples.en: Her expression suddenly altered.
examples.zh: 她的表情突然变了。

examples.en: Her expression grew solemn.
examples.zh: 她的表情显得严肃起来。

examples.en: Reaction to the visit is mixed.
examples.zh: 对这次访问的反应不一。

examples.en: His reaction struck me as odd.
examples.zh: 他的反应令我诧异。

examples.en: Those products have rightly been stopped in accordance with our safety routines.
examples.zh: 根据我们的安全惯例，停止使用那些产品是正确的。

examples.en: In accordance with the stress-triggering hypothesis, faults are unpredictably responsive to subtle stresses they obtain as neighboring faults shift.
examples.zh: 根据应力触发假说，断层不可预测地对邻近断层移动时所获得的微妙应力作出反应。

examples.en: Rachel looked pale and weary.
examples.zh: 雷切尔看起来苍白而疲惫。

examples.en: She suddenly felt old and weary.
examples.zh: 她突然感到了衰老和疲倦。

examples.en: We intend to appeal the verdict.
examples.zh: 我们打算对此裁决提出申诉。

examples.en: We must broaden our appeal.
examples.zh: 我们必须扩大我们的吸引力。

examples.en: The site for the airport will be reclaimed from the swamp.
examples.zh: 这片湿地将会被开发来建机场。

examples.en: I spent one whole night by a swamp behind the road listening to frogs.
examples.zh: 我整个晚上都在这条路后面的一个沼泽地旁听蛙鸣。

examples.en: An entrepreneur is more than just a risk taker. He is a visionary.
examples.zh: 企业家不仅是个冒险者，还是一个有远见的人。

examples.en: American entrepreneur Steve Jobs believed so.
examples.zh: 美国企业家史蒂夫·乔布斯对这一点坚信不疑。

examples.en: She vowed to herself that she would dedicate her life to scientific studies.
examples.zh: 她默默地发誓要献身于科学研究。

examples.en: Dedicate a small shelf or a drawer to lunch things and kit it out with the basics.
examples.zh: 贡献出一个小架子或一个抽屉来装午餐材料，将基本用品装备齐全。

examples.en: The boat was anchored off the northern coast of the peninsula.
examples.zh: 那只船停泊在了离半岛北海岸不远处。

examples.en: Dalian is in the south of the Liaodong Peninsula.
examples.zh: 大连位于辽东半岛南部。

examples.en: Extensive repair work is being carried out.
examples.zh: 大规模的修缮工作正在进行。

examples.en: The report is underpinned by extensive research.
examples.zh: 这份报告以广泛的研究为基础。

examples.en: Most new residential buildings in Sweden are already heated with ground-source heat pumps.
examples.zh: 在瑞典，大多数新建的住宅建筑都已经由地源热泵系统供暖。

examples.en: Environmental organizations want to preserve the land surrounding the Wilgrinn Wilderness Area from residential development.
examples.zh: 环保组织希望保护威尔格林荒野地区周围的土地不受住宅开发的影响。

examples.en: I definitely remember sending the letter.
examples.zh: 我记得这封信肯定发出去了。

examples.en: This site is definitely worth bookmarking.
examples.zh: 这个网站绝对值得设电子书签。

examples.en: It made Peter kick instead of stab.
examples.zh: 它让彼得踢而不是刺。

examples.en: She felt a sudden stab of pain in the chest.
examples.zh: 她胸部突然感到一阵剧痛。

examples.en: The captain gave the order to abandon ship.
examples.zh: 船长下令弃船。

examples.en: Snow forced many drivers to abandon their vehicles.
examples.zh: 大雪迫使许多驾驶者弃车步行。

examples.en: It was a collaboration that produced extremely useful results.
examples.zh: 这是一次带来极其有益的成果的合作。

examples.en: The government worked in close collaboration with teachers on the new curriculum.
examples.zh: 政府和教师就新的课程进行了紧密协作。

examples.en: He has neither the policies nor the personal charisma to inspire people.
examples.zh: 他既没有谋略也没有个人魅力去鼓舞人。

examples.en: We must promote originality, inspire creativity and encourage innovation.
examples.zh: 我们必须提倡独创性，激发创造力，鼓励创新。

examples.en: The ability to impart knowledge and command respect is the essential qualification for teachers.
examples.zh: 传授知识并博得尊敬的能力对老师们来说是基本的条件。

examples.en: You need to have specialist teachers who impart what they know.
examples.zh: 你需要有专业的老师来传授他们所知道的知识。

examples.en: They are faced with a mountain of bureaucracy.
examples.zh: 他们面临着一大堆的官僚制度。

examples.en: Bureaucracy can entangle applications for months.
examples.zh: 官僚主义会使申请耽搁数月之久。

examples.en: She became a household name in the 1960s.
examples.zh: 她在20世纪60年代成为家喻户晓的人物。

examples.en: Today, fashion designers are household names.
examples.zh: 如今，服装设计师们家喻户晓。

examples.en: The plane managed to glide down to the runway.
examples.zh: 飞机终于成功地滑翔降落在跑道上。

examples.en: That summer was the glide path of our love.
examples.zh: 那个夏天是我们爱情的下滑航道。

examples.en: This drug is known to have adverse side effects.
examples.zh: 众所周知，这种药具有不良副作用。

examples.en: The improper use of medicine could lead to severe adverse reactions.
examples.zh: 用药不当会引起严重的不良反应。

examples.en: The Internet is the largest computer bulletin board in the world, and it's growing.
examples.zh: 因特网是世界上最大的电子布告栏，并且仍在不断扩大。

examples.en: At 3:30 p.m. a bulletin was released announcing that the president was out of immediate danger.
examples.zh: 下午3:30发布了公告，宣布总统暂时脱离了危险。

examples.en: The original intention was to devote three months to the project.
examples.zh: 最初的计划是在这个项目上投入三个月的时间。

examples.en: It can't be denied that we need to devote more resources to this problem.
examples.zh: 无可否认，我们必须投入更多的资源来解决这个问题。

examples.en: I had right of way at the junction.
examples.zh: 我在这交叉路口有优先通行权。

examples.en: Buses have priority at this junction.
examples.zh: 在这个路口，公共汽车有优先通行权。

examples.en: Nix the anonymous letter; anyone would crumble under the weight of that humiliation.
examples.zh: 千万不要写匿名信；任何人都不会承受住这样的侮辱而崩溃的。

examples.en: If you are living for others before yourself and pushing your own needs aside, eventually you will crumble in some way.
examples.zh: 如果你先为别人而活，把自己的需求放在一边，那么你一定会崩溃的。

examples.en: Beeswax acts as an emulsifying agent.
examples.zh: 蜂蜡可以用作乳化剂。

examples.en: An agent bought the rights to his life.
examples.zh: 一个代理商购买了他生平传记的出版权。

examples.en: Is abortion morally defensible?
examples.zh: 堕胎从道德上讲合乎情理吗？

examples.en: Abortion is a very emotional issue.
examples.zh: 堕胎是个令人情绪十分激动的问题。

examples.en: The Salvation Army shops depend on regular supplies of saleable items.
examples.zh: 救世军商店靠的是获得容易卖物品的经常性的供应。

examples.en: In some religious groups, wealth was a symbol of probable salvation and high morals, and fatness a sign of wealth and well-being.
examples.zh: 在一些宗教团体中，财富是救赎和高尚道德的象征，而肥胖则是财富和幸福的象征。

examples.en: He should have let his instinct guide him.
examples.zh: 他本该让直觉指导他的行动。

examples.en: Many birds have a remarkable homing instinct.
examples.zh: 很多鸟类具有了不起的返回原地的本能。

examples.en: The stillness of the night was broken by the boom of a cannon.
examples.zh: 夜晚的寂静被大炮的轰鸣声打破了。

examples.en: We heard the bang of a cannon.
examples.zh: 我们听到轰的一声炮响。

examples.en: It would be hazardous to invest so much.
examples.zh: 投资这么多会有风险。

examples.en: Many people don't like to invest in stocks.
examples.zh: 许多人不喜欢投资股票。

examples.en: Her reputation was in tatters.
examples.zh: 她已名誉扫地。

examples.en: His reputation is without a blemish.
examples.zh: 他的名誉可说是白璧无瑕。

examples.en: The project is in its final stages.
examples.zh: 这个项目到了最后阶段。

examples.en: The whole project was badly managed.
examples.zh: 整个项目管理得差劲。

examples.en: He gave a self-deprecating shrug.
examples.zh: 他自谦地耸耸肩。

examples.en: Erica made a little deprecating shrug.
examples.zh: 埃里卡做了个有点儿不以为然的耸肩动作。

examples.en: A 20,000-seat arena with a retractable roof is planned.
examples.zh: 一个可容纳2万名观众、带伸缩顶棚的竞技场正在规划中。

examples.en: This is an arena for gladiators only, for the Titans of the track.
examples.zh: 这是个仅为勇士而且是仅为此行里的大力士勇士所设的竞技场。

examples.en: He values his independence.
examples.zh: 他珍惜他的独立自主。

examples.en: He was afraid of losing his independence.
examples.zh: 他担心丧失自己的独立。

examples.en: Once shrub covers everything, you lose the meadow habitat.
examples.zh: 一旦灌木覆盖了一切，你就失去了草地的栖息地。

examples.en: Once the fire is out, the grass and shrub ecosystems should return quickly.
examples.zh: 火一旦被熄灭，草和灌木的生态系统就会很快恢复。

examples.en: A computer software glitch fouled up their presentation.
examples.zh: 一个电脑软件故障弄砸了他们的展示会。

examples.en: I am making a multimedia presentation for my science project.
examples.zh: 我正在为我的科学项目做多媒体演示。

examples.en: The Security Council can nominate anyone for secretary-general.
examples.zh: 安全理事会可以提名任何人为秘书长。

examples.en: If you'd like to recognize the greenness of an individual or organization, why not nominate them for an Environmental Achievement Award.
examples.zh: 如果你想赞扬某个人或团体的绿色环保行为，何不将他们提名为环境成就奖的候选人？

examples.en: She sat at her loom and continued to weave.
examples.zh: 她坐在织布机前，继续织布。

examples.en: You've got to be able to make decisions on the fly as deadlines loom.
examples.zh: 你必须能够立刻作出决定，因为最后期限迫在眉睫。

examples.en: In short, the shinbashira was acting like an enormous stationary pendulum.
examples.zh: 简而言之，这个中心支柱就像一个巨大而静止的钟摆。

examples.en: The car should remain stationary when you take your foot off the brake pedal.
examples.zh: 当你的脚离开刹车踏板时，汽车应该保持静止。

examples.en: The government is taking steps to restrain inflation.
examples.zh: 政府正在采取措施控制通货膨胀。

examples.en: They couldn't restrain their excitement.
examples.zh: 他们无法抑制自己的激动。

examples.en: 15 is an awkward age.
examples.zh: 15岁是个尴尬的年纪。

examples.en: Amy made an awkward gesture with her hands.
examples.zh: 艾米用双手做了一个笨拙的手势。

examples.en: Gambling was his ruin.
examples.zh: 赌博毁了他。

examples.en: The bank stepped in to save the company from financial ruin.
examples.zh: 银行的介入使这家公司免于经济崩溃。

examples.en: I wish we'd known about it beforehand.
examples.zh: 要是我们预先知道这事就好了。

examples.en: I have to say in her defence that she knew nothing about it beforehand.
examples.zh: 我得为她说句话，她事先并不知道此事。

examples.en: We have a formidable task ahead of us.
examples.zh: 我们面前有一项艰巨的任务。

examples.en: The elderly are a formidable force in any election.
examples.zh: 老年人在任何选举中都是一股强大的力量。

examples.en: They were impatient at the delay.
examples.zh: 他们对拖延不耐烦了。

examples.en: He darted Vicky an impatient look.
examples.zh: 他不耐烦地瞥了维基一眼。

examples.en: Aspects are used to invert dependencies and decouple code.
examples.zh: 方面用于倒置依赖和解耦代码。

examples.en: No condition, however, the option to invert the result it used.
examples.zh: No条件使用相同的代码片段，不过，在这里使用了将结果取反的选项。

examples.en: She rocked the baby to sleep in its cradle.
examples.zh: 她摇动摇篮哄婴儿入睡。

examples.en: The baby was rocked to sleep in a cradle.
examples.zh: 婴儿在摇篮里被摇得睡着了。

examples.en: Social structures are not discrete objects; they overlap and interweave.
examples.zh: 社会结构不是离散的客体；他们重叠并交织在一起。

examples.en: Put simply, a class is a discrete block or bundle of variables and methods.
examples.zh: 简单地说，类是一个由变量和方法组成的离散块或束。

examples.en: He would like an assurance that other forces will not move into the territory that his forces vacate.
examples.zh: 他想要其他部队不会进入他的部队撤出的那个领地的一个保证。

examples.en: A review of this book in The Times lamented that Mr. Davis had given us no especial assurance that any of the traditional accidents can save us once more.
examples.zh: 《泰晤士报》的一篇书评惋惜道：“戴维斯先生并没有向我们保证，任何传统的事故都能再次拯救我们。”

examples.en: One forensic psychiatrist described him as having an incurable antisocial personality disorder.
examples.zh: 一位法庭精神病医生将他描述为患有不可治愈反社会人格障碍。

examples.en: She'd better see a psychiatrist at the consoling center.
examples.zh: 她最好去心理咨询中心看精神病医生。

examples.en: There is a great sense of team spirit in the squad.
examples.zh: 这个班有很高的团队忠诚度。

examples.en: He was disappointed with his exclusion from the England squad.
examples.zh: 他对自己没有入选英格兰队感到失望。

examples.en: A stroke can disrupt the supply of oxygen to the brain.
examples.zh: 中风可导致大脑供氧中断。

examples.en: It could disrupt the food chains there.
examples.zh: 它可能会破坏那里的食物链。

examples.en: He had a scar on his forehead.
examples.zh: 他前额上有个伤疤。

examples.en: Will the operation leave a scar?
examples.zh: 手术会不会留下疤痕？

examples.en: The sergeant assigned him to KP.
examples.zh: 中士派他下伙房去帮厨。

examples.en: The sergeant snapped out an order.
examples.zh: 中士厉声下达命令。

examples.en: Tourism is vital for the economy.
examples.zh: 旅游业对于经济至关重要。

examples.en: Trust is a vital component in any relationship.
examples.zh: 在任何关系中，信任都是一个至关重要的因素。

examples.en: Most people considered him a harmless eccentric.
examples.zh: 多数人都认为他是一个无伤大雅的怪人。

examples.en: Her fey charm and eccentric ways were legendary.
examples.zh: 她让人捉摸不定的魅力和无厘头的作风是个传奇。

examples.en: She was unafraid of conflict.
examples.zh: 她不怕发生冲突。

examples.en: These results conflict with earlier findings.
examples.zh: 这些结果与早期的发现相矛盾。

examples.en: Before you buy a new appliance, talk to someone who owns one.
examples.zh: 购买新电器之前，先和有这个电器的人谈谈。

examples.en: When people discover that an appliance is broken, they often stop using it.
examples.zh: 当人们发现电器坏了，通常就不会再去使用它了。

examples.en: Bronze is an alloy of copper and tin.
examples.zh: 青铜是一种铜锡合金。

examples.en: Brass is an alloy of copper and zinc.
examples.zh: 黄铜是铜锌合金。

examples.en: I was under the delusion that he intended to marry me.
examples.zh: 我有一种错觉，他要娶我。

examples.en: Insinuations about her mental state, about her capacity for delusion, were being made.
examples.zh: 当时有对她的精神状态的影射——说她有妄想症的影射。

examples.en: Photons have no mass – they are weightless.
examples.zh: 光子没有质量——它们是没有重量的。

examples.en: The mass media tends to personalize politics.
examples.zh: 大众传媒往往把政治个人化。

examples.en: Arnold could detect a certain sadness in the old man's face.
examples.zh: 阿诺德能察觉到老人脸上的某种悲伤。

examples.en: We are trying to detect and understand how the climates change.
examples.zh: 我们在努力探测并了解气候是怎样变化的。

examples.en: The one thing that she accomplished was raising money to update our facilities.
examples.zh: 她完成的这项工作就是募集资金来更新我们的设备。

examples.en: You'll need to update your card details directly on our website.
examples.zh: 您需要直接在我们的网站上更新您的银行卡信息。

examples.en: Popular art is experiencing a renaissance.
examples.zh: 通俗艺术正在复兴。

examples.en: The theme of the conference is renaissance Europe.
examples.zh: 该会议的主题是文艺复兴时期的欧洲。

examples.en: This gas is highly poisonous.
examples.zh: 这种气体有剧毒。

examples.en: Burning sulphur creates poisonous fumes.
examples.zh: 燃烧的硫磺会产生有毒烟雾。

examples.en: The Church has a duty to condemn violence.
examples.zh: 基督教会有义务谴责暴力。

examples.en: Like everyone else, I deplore and condemn this killing.
examples.zh: 我同所有人一样强烈谴责这桩凶杀案。

examples.en: Can I be of any assistance?
examples.zh: 我能有所帮助吗？

examples.en: They rendered assistance to the disaster victims.
examples.zh: 他们给灾民提供了援助。

examples.en: Gene clerked at the auction.
examples.zh: 吉恩在拍卖行做文书工作。

examples.en: The sale is a big coup for the auction house.
examples.zh: 这次拍卖额对该拍卖行而言是极为难得的成就。

examples.en: The tiny rocket is attached to the spacecraft and is designed to propel it toward Mars.
examples.zh: 微型火箭附在宇宙飞船上，用来推进飞船飞向火星。

examples.en: He also used ski poles in an unorthodox way—to propel himself as he skied.
examples.zh: 他还以一种非正统的方式使用滑雪杖，就是在滑雪时用它推动自己。

examples.en: Admit it! You were terrified!
examples.zh: 承认了吧！你吓坏了！

examples.en: I must admit I am impressed.
examples.zh: 我得承认我很佩服。

examples.en: He staggered on the uneven surface.
examples.zh: 他摇摇晃晃地走在高低不平的表面上。

examples.en: The floor felt uneven under his feet.
examples.zh: 他觉得脚下的地板高低不平。

examples.en: What's your definition of happiness?
examples.zh: 你对幸福的定义是什么？

examples.en: Can you give a more precise definition of the word?
examples.zh: 你能给这个词下个更确切的定义吗？

examples.en: The mansion has been put up for sale.
examples.zh: 该豪宅已待售。

examples.en: His new luxury mansion was a world away from the tiny house where he was born.
examples.zh: 他那座新的豪宅与他出生的小屋完全不能相比。

examples.en: The gunman, whose mask had slipped, fled.
examples.zh: 面具滑落的持枪歹徒逃走了。

examples.en: Dina lit a cigarette, trying to mask her agitation.
examples.zh: 黛娜点燃了一支烟，试图掩饰她的不安。

examples.en: He failed to return from a patrol.
examples.zh: 他没能从一次巡逻中回来。

examples.en: Highway patrol officers closed the road.
examples.zh: 公路巡警关闭了这条路。

examples.en: Iron and some nickel, both of which are metals.
examples.zh: 铁和一些镍，它们俩都是金属。

examples.en: Among all commodities, nickel and copper are under particular stress.
examples.zh: 在所有大宗商品中，镍和铜尤其承压。

examples.en: Frederick the Great was the patron of many artists.
examples.zh: 腓特烈大帝是许多艺术家的赞助人。

examples.en: Catherine the Great was a patron of the arts and sciences.
examples.zh: 凯瑟琳大帝是艺术和科学的赞助人。

examples.en: What kind of responsibilities does that job entail?
examples.zh: 那份工作需要承担什么样的责任？

examples.en: Self-awareness, even in its earliest stages, might entail an awareness of others, the ability to see their perspective, to look at the world from another's point of view.
examples.zh: 自我意识，即使在它的最初阶段，也可能需要他人意识，即从他人的角度看世界的能力。

examples.en: Modern music is often considered inferior to that of the past.
examples.zh: 现代音乐常被认为不如过去的。

examples.en: He preferred the company of those who were intellectually inferior to himself.
examples.zh: 他喜欢与那些智力不如他的人为伍。

examples.en: I am continuing to apply for jobs.
examples.zh: 我在继续申请工作。

examples.en: The convention does not apply to us.
examples.zh: 该协定对我们不适用。

examples.en: They disseminated anti-French propaganda.
examples.zh: 他们散布了反法宣传资料。

examples.en: Art may be used as a vehicle for propaganda.
examples.zh: 艺术可以用作宣传的工具。

examples.en: Houses which overlook the lake cost more.
examples.zh: 俯瞰湖泊的房子要价高些。

examples.en: I pulled off the road at a scenic overlook.
examples.zh: 在一个可以眺望优美风景的地方，我将车停在了路旁。

examples.en: They took refuge in a bomb shelter.
examples.zh: 他们在一个防空洞里避难。

examples.en: A further 300 people have taken refuge in the US embassy.
examples.zh: 又有300人在美国大使馆避难。

examples.en: She gave a dramatic shudder of repulsion.
examples.zh: 她由于厌恶而身体剧烈发抖。

examples.en: He struck his breast in a dramatic gesture.
examples.zh: 他以戏剧性的姿态捶他的胸。

examples.en: I felt I'd made an incredible discovery.
examples.zh: 我感到自己有了一个惊人的发现。

examples.en: "It was incredible," Kurt says, suddenly aglow.
examples.zh: “简直是令人难以置信，”库尔特突然容光焕发地说到。

examples.en: A general election became a certainty last week.
examples.zh: 普选上周已成必然。

examples.en: Such attitudes are valueless unless they reflect inner cognition and certainty.
examples.zh: 这种态度如果不能反映内心的认知和确定性就毫无价值。

examples.en: He has devised a process for making gold wires which neither corrode nor oxidize.
examples.zh: 他发明了一种制造程序，使金线既不会腐蚀也不会氧化。

examples.en: The tools will corrode with rust if never used.
examples.zh: 这些工具如果从不使用就会生锈。

examples.en: The disease had deformed his spine.
examples.zh: 疾病导致他脊柱变形。

examples.en: A bone in my spine was out of alignment.
examples.zh: 我的脊椎骨有一节脱位。

examples.en: The reports commend her bravery.
examples.zh: 报告称赞她的英勇。

examples.en: I can commend it to him as a realistic course of action.
examples.zh: 我可以把它作为一套现实的行动方案推荐给他。

examples.en: One of the ways the parasite spreads is through faecal matter.
examples.zh: 寄生物传播的方式之一就是透过排泄物。

examples.en: Schistosomiasis is diagnosed through the detection of parasite eggs in stool or urine specimens.
examples.zh: 血吸虫病的诊断方法是，检测粪便或尿液标本中寄生虫卵。

examples.en: This food contains no artificial flavourings.
examples.zh: 这种食品不含人工调味品。

examples.en: The juice contains no artificial preservatives.
examples.zh: 这种果汁不含人工防腐剂。

examples.en: Vitamin deficiency in the diet can cause illness.
examples.zh: 饮食中缺乏维生素可能导致疾病。

examples.en: Opacity of the eye lens can be induced by deficiency of certain vitamins.
examples.zh: 眼球晶状体的混浊可由缺乏某些维生素引起。

examples.en: Lots of children have imaginary friends.
examples.zh: 许多孩子都有假想的朋友。

examples.en: Many children invent an imaginary friend.
examples.zh: 很多儿童都有一个假想朋友。

examples.en: The formula is jealously guarded.
examples.zh: 对该配方戒备森严。

examples.en: This formula is used to calculate the area of a circle.
examples.zh: 这个公式用于计算圆的面积。

examples.en: Some people hooted in disgust.
examples.zh: 有些人厌恶地大声嚷嚷。

examples.en: He walked away in disgust.
examples.zh: 他感到厌恶，就走开了。

examples.en: Tomorrow we will transcend these as well, and the dreamers will deserve a lot of the credit.
examples.zh: 明天我们也将超越这些成就，且梦想家们将会得到更多的荣誉。

examples.en: Baudelaire regarded photography as "a very humble servant of art and science"; a medium largely unable to transcend "external reality".
examples.zh: 波德莱尔认为摄影是“艺术和科学的一个非常卑微的仆人”；是一种很大程度上无法超越“外部现实”的媒介。

examples.en: The director paid tribute to all she had done for the charity.
examples.zh: 董事赞扬她为慈善事业所做的一切。

examples.en: At her funeral her oldest friend paid tribute to her life and work.
examples.zh: 在葬礼上，她最早的朋友对她的一生和工作给予了高度的赞扬。

examples.en: An angry mob gathered outside the courthouse.
examples.zh: 一群愤怒的民众聚集到了法院外面。

examples.en: She pushed her way through the mob and confronted him face to face.
examples.zh: 她从那群暴民中挤出来，与他当面对峙。

examples.en: Sixty of his subordinate officers followed his example.
examples.zh: 他的60个下级官员都以他为榜样。

examples.en: He was both willing and able to subordinate all else to this aim.
examples.zh: 他既愿意也能够让别的一切从属于这个目标。

examples.en: This is a growing trend.
examples.zh: 这是一个不断增长的趋势。

examples.en: These statistics display a definite trend.
examples.zh: 这些统计数据表现出一种明显的趋势。

examples.en: It is an impressive achievement.
examples.zh: 这是一项令人敬佩的成就。

examples.en: 2004 was a year of solid achievement.
examples.zh: 2004年是颇有成绩的一年。

examples.en: She was a short, sturdy woman in her early sixties.
examples.zh: 她是一位六十出头、矮小结实的女人。

examples.en: If you have to climb up, use a firm platform or a sturdy ladder.
examples.zh: 如果你必须爬上去，就用一个稳固的平台或者一个结实的梯子。

examples.en: It is desirable that interest rates be reduced.
examples.zh: 利率下调是可取的。

examples.en: It is desirable that interest rates should be reduced.
examples.zh: 利率下调是可取的。

examples.en: True education does not consist in simply being taught facts.
examples.zh: 真正的教育并不在于简单地讲授事实。

examples.en: The development will consist of 66 dwellings and a number of offices.
examples.zh: 新建楼区将由66栋住房和一些办公用房组成。

examples.en: She was efficient and reliable.
examples.zh: 她既能干又可靠。

examples.en: I know she's honest and reliable.
examples.zh: 我知道她是诚实可靠的。

examples.en: The new system will be compatible with existing equipment.
examples.zh: 新的系统将与现有的设备相互兼容。

examples.en: Free enterprise, he argued, was compatible with Russian values and traditions.
examples.zh: 他辩称自由企业与俄罗斯的价值观和传统是相容的。

examples.en: There will be a strong incentive to enter into a process of negotiation.
examples.zh: 将会有一个强烈的刺激来进入谈判的过程。

examples.en: Neither side would have a real incentive to start a war. Ergo, peace would reign.
examples.zh: 双方都没有发动战争的真实动机。因此，和平将会到来。

examples.en: Turner is a writer and critic.
examples.zh: 特纳是一位作家和评论家。

examples.en: He was also for a time an art critic.
examples.zh: 他曾有相当长的一段时间是一位艺术评论家。

examples.en: The doctors have successfully concluded preliminary tests.
examples.zh: 医生们已成功完成了初步化验。

examples.en: Preliminary results show the Republican Party with 11 percent of the vote.
examples.zh: 初步结果显示共和党得到11%的选票。

examples.en: Overcrowding remains a large obstacle to improving conditions.
examples.zh: 过度拥挤仍然是改善条件的一大障碍。

examples.en: A lack of qualifications can be a major obstacle to finding a job.
examples.zh: 学历不足可能成为谋职的主要障碍。

examples.en: They're both doctors by profession.
examples.zh: 他们两人的职业都是医生。

examples.en: Harper was a teacher by profession.
examples.zh: 哈珀的职业是教师。

examples.en: The driver got out of his van.
examples.zh: 司机从货车里下来。

examples.en: I drove cross-country in his van.
examples.zh: 我开着他的货车横穿了全国。

examples.en: She felt dizzy and nauseous.
examples.zh: 她觉得头晕、恶心。

examples.en: Climbing so high made me feel dizzy.
examples.zh: 爬那么高使我感到头晕目眩。

examples.en: She bears an uncanny resemblance to Dido.
examples.zh: 她跟迪多长得离奇的相似。

examples.en: He bears a striking resemblance to Lenin.
examples.zh: 他与列宁有着不同寻常的相似之处。

examples.en: This deadline will be extended only in exceptional circumstances.
examples.zh: 只有在特殊情况下才会延长最后期限。

examples.en: Capital punishment is allowable only under exceptional circumstances.
examples.zh: 只有在特殊情况下才允许判死刑。

examples.en: China's ethnic minorities constitute less than 7 percent of its total population.
examples.zh: 中国的少数民族构成总人口的不到7%。

examples.en: Testing patients without their consent would constitute a professional and legal offence.
examples.zh: 未得病人同意即对其进行试验会构成职业和法律犯罪。

examples.en: "Cherish her," I said.
examples.zh: “珍惜她。”我说。

examples.en: Time is valuable, and we should cherish it.
examples.zh: 时间宝贵，我们应该珍惜时间。

examples.en: The discrepancy is startlingly apparent.
examples.zh: 差异这么明显，令人吃惊。

examples.en: Which of the following, if true, best reconciles the apparent discrepancy presented in the passage?
examples.zh: 下列哪个选项，如果正确，最好地调和了文章中呈现的明显差异？

examples.en: Red and violet are at opposite ends of the spectrum.
examples.zh: 红色和紫色位于光谱的两端。

examples.en: A spectrum is formed by a ray of light passing through a prism.
examples.zh: 一束光通过棱镜就会形成光谱。

examples.en: She utterly failed to convince them.
examples.zh: 她根本没有说服他们。

examples.en: Thomas, she sensed, could convince anyone of anything.
examples.zh: 她觉得，托马斯能说服任何人相信任何事。

examples.en: It seems commonly believed that companies are not motivated to prolong their products' lifespan.
examples.zh: 人们似乎普遍认为，公司没有动力去延长产品的寿命。

examples.en: In government laboratories and elsewhere, scientists are seeking a drug able to prolong life and youthful vigor.
examples.zh: 在政府实验室和其他地方，科学家们正在寻找一种能够延长寿命、让人保持年轻活力的药物。

examples.en: My mother would still like me to be a missionary in Africa.
examples.zh: 我母亲还是想让我在非洲做一名传教士。

examples.en: She had a kind of missionary zeal about bringing culture to the masses.
examples.zh: 她对把文化带给大众具有一种传教士般的热情。

examples.en: After a lot of agonizing she decided to terminate the pregnancy.
examples.zh: 在多次痛苦的考虑后，她决定终止妊娠。

examples.en: In American law, you cannot terminate an employee, for the sole purpose of age.
examples.zh: 在美国法律中，你不能仅仅因为年龄而解雇员工。

examples.en: The valve has jammed shut.
examples.zh: 阀门给卡住了打不开。

examples.en: This valve regulates the flow of water.
examples.zh: 这个阀门调节水流。

examples.en: We will refund you your money in full.
examples.zh: 我们会退还你所有的钱。

examples.en: Ask for a refund if the goods are faulty.
examples.zh: 商品如有缺陷，可要求退款。

examples.en: The Ainu settlers in Hokkaido are the last remnant of a prehistoric race.
examples.zh: 北海道的阿伊努人是史前某个种族的最后残存者。

examples.en: It's not a remnant of some huge population that is dwindled in the last few hundred years for some reason.
examples.zh: 它并不是由于某种原因而在过去几百年里减少的庞大人口的残余。

examples.en: The medicine is not for internal use.
examples.zh: 这种药不可内服。

examples.en: The country stepped up internal security.
examples.zh: 该国加强了国内安全防卫。

examples.en: He edits the literary journal, Murmur.
examples.zh: 他编辑了《私语》这本文学杂志。

examples.en: He was asked to judge a literary competition.
examples.zh: 他被邀请评判一场文学竞赛。

examples.en: Most classical music sends me to sleep.
examples.zh: 大多数古典音乐都会让我睡着。

examples.en: 'Swan Lake' is one of the great classical ballets.
examples.zh: 《天鹅湖》是一部伟大的古典芭蕾舞剧。

examples.en: He arrogated the privilege to himself alone.
examples.zh: 他只为自己捞取特权。

examples.en: She was cocooned in a private world of privilege.
examples.zh: 她生活在与世隔绝的特权世界里。

examples.en: He was brought on as (a) substitute after half-time.
examples.zh: 他作为替补队员在下半场上场。

examples.en: Jefferson entered as a substitute in the 60th minute.
examples.zh: 杰斐逊在第60分钟时作为替补队员上了场。

examples.en: We paid off our mortgage after fifteen years.
examples.zh: 我们历经十五年的时间还清了抵押借款。

examples.en: Mortgage defaults have risen in the last year.
examples.zh: 按揭借款违约在近一年里呈上升趋势。

examples.en: Some 4,000 firefighters are battling the blaze.
examples.zh: 约有四千名消防人员正在与大火搏斗。

examples.en: She fled from the blaze, coughing and spluttering.
examples.zh: 她从大火中逃出来，一边咳嗽，一边噗噗地吐气。

examples.en: She saw that there was indeed a man immediately behind her. Moreover, he was observing her strangely.
examples.zh: 她看到的确有个男人紧跟在她身后。而且，他还在怪异地观察着她。

examples.en: Moreover, you're a social being.
examples.zh: 而且，你是个社会人。

examples.en: When the tree falls，the monkeys scatter.
examples.zh: “树倒猴狲散。”

examples.en: A transparent object doesn't absorb or scatter light.
examples.zh: 透明物体不吸收或散射光。

examples.en: Thornburgh said such demands wouldn't violate the First Amendment.
examples.zh: 桑伯说这样的要求不违反第一修正案。

examples.en: Nuclear weapons seem to violate the just war principle of proportionality.
examples.zh: 核武器似乎违背了罚当其罪的正义战争原则。

examples.en: Today is Presidents' Day, a federal holiday.
examples.zh: 今天是总统纪念日，一个联邦假日。

examples.en: They are proscribed by federal law from owning guns.
examples.zh: 根据联邦法律规定，他们不准拥有枪支。

examples.en: An external auditor will verify the accounts.
examples.zh: 外部审计员将核实这些账目。

examples.en: They now take extra steps to verify the creditworthiness of customers.
examples.zh: 他们现在采取额外措施来验证客户的信用。

examples.en: She felt more than usually hungry after her excursion.
examples.zh: 远足后她感到非同寻常地饥饿。

examples.en: Another pleasant excursion is Matamoros, 18 miles away.
examples.zh: 另一个怡人的短程旅游是18英里外的马塔莫罗斯。

examples.en: Afghanistan is due to inaugurate a parliament.
examples.zh: 阿富汗将举行新议会典礼。

examples.en: Q: the 8th China-ASEAN Expo will inaugurate tomorrow. Please brief us on the attendance of ASEAN leaders.
examples.zh: 问：第八届中国-东盟博览会将于明天开幕，请介绍东盟国家政要出席情况。

examples.en: These act like batteries when they undergo a temperature change: attach electrodes to them and they generate a current.
examples.zh: 它们经历温度变化时会像电池一样工作：给它们接上电极，它们就会产生电流。

examples.en: Fans may undergo body searches by security guards.
examples.zh: 仰慕者们可能要接受保安人员的搜身。

examples.en: You deserve a reward for being so helpful.
examples.zh: 你帮了这么大的忙，理应受到奖励。

examples.en: Winning the match was just reward for the effort the team had made.
examples.zh: 赢得比赛的胜利是全队付出努力应得的回报。

examples.en: The land is used by local people to graze their animals.
examples.zh: 这块地当地人用来放牧。

examples.en: I anoint the head and nose of each sheep with the same oil, and allow them to graze.
examples.zh: 我用同样的油抹在每只羊的头上和鼻子上，并让它们吃草。

examples.en: He paid with a two-for-one coupon.
examples.zh: 他用一张买二送一优惠券结账。

examples.en: You can get a surprise with a coupon in the following stores.
examples.zh: 你可以在以下的商店中用优惠券获得一个惊喜。

examples.en: It was an elite that believed its task was to enlighten the multitude.
examples.zh: 精英人物都会认为自己的职责就是启迪群众。

examples.en: He preached to the assembled multitude.
examples.zh: 他向聚集在那里的民众布道。

examples.en: They inhabit reed huts built on stilts above the water.
examples.zh: 他们居住在建在水中木桩上的芦苇草屋里。

examples.en: The Olympic marmots inhabit meadows high in the Olympic Mountains where the weather conditions are much harsher.
examples.zh: 奥林匹克土拨鼠栖息的草地在奥林匹克山脉的高地，那里的气候条件要恶劣得多。

examples.en: The siege has ended peacefully.
examples.zh: 围城已经和平地结束了。

examples.en: The siege is now in its eighteenth day.
examples.zh: 围困现在是第18天了。

examples.en: Abstract art is an acquired taste.
examples.zh: 要慢慢培养才会欣赏抽象艺术。

examples.en: It's not a question of some abstract concept of justice.
examples.zh: 这不是一个有关正义的某一抽象概念的问题。

examples.en: His agenda is discordant with ours.
examples.zh: 他的日程与我们的有冲突。

examples.en: What's the next item on the agenda?
examples.zh: 议程的下一项是什么？

examples.en: Inactivity can make your joints stiff, and the bones may begin to degenerate.
examples.zh: 不活动会使关节僵硬，骨骼因此可能会开始退化。

examples.en: The newly emerging forces are bound to defeat what is corrupt and degenerate.
examples.zh: 新生力量必然战胜腐朽力量。

examples.en: Parents want to know the best way to nurture and raise their child to adulthood.
examples.zh: 父母们想了解把他们的孩子养育成人的最好方法。

examples.en: Unique to mammals, the limbic cortex impels creatures to nurture their offspring by delivering feelings of tenderness and warmth to the parent when children are nearby.
examples.zh: 当哺乳动物的孩子们在附近时，独有的边缘皮层向家长传递温柔和温暖的感觉，促使哺乳动物去养育后代。

examples.en: He was unable to contain his own destructive feelings.
examples.zh: 他无法克制自己的消极情绪。

examples.en: The war was a paradigm of the destructive side of human nature.
examples.zh: 那场战争尽显人性中具有破坏性的一面。

examples.en: Don't be fooled by his appearance.
examples.zh: 不要被他的外表所蒙蔽。

examples.en: She sets great store by her appearance.
examples.zh: 她十分看重自己的外貌。

examples.en: We are living in a consumer culture.
examples.zh: 我们生活在一种消费文化之中。

examples.en: This tradition has no parallel in our culture.
examples.zh: 这种传统在我们的文化中是没有的。

examples.en: He refused to admit paternity of the child.
examples.zh: 他拒不承认是那孩子的父亲。

examples.en: They have had a significant change in policy on paternity leave.
examples.zh: 他们对男人休产假制度作出了重大改变。

examples.en: Let's not make any hasty decisions.
examples.zh: 我们不要匆忙作决定。

examples.en: I made a hasty exit and managed to open the gate.
examples.zh: 我匆忙离场，设法打开了大门。

examples.en: You can remain anonymous if you wish.
examples.zh: 如果你愿意你可以保持匿名。

examples.en: The donor prefers to remain anonymous.
examples.zh: 捐赠者希望不披露姓名。

examples.en: No one spotted that the gun was a fake.
examples.zh: 没有人留意到那是一支假枪。

examples.en: A sharp-eyed shop clerk spotted the fake.
examples.zh: 一名眼尖的售货员发现了假货。

examples.en: The bridge crosses the river in a single span.
examples.zh: 河上的桥为单跨桥。

examples.en: The apartment was spick-and-span.
examples.zh: 这套公寓非常干净整洁。

examples.en: Police were called to escort her off the premises.
examples.zh: 召来警察护送她离场。

examples.en: He arrived with a police escort shortly before half past nine.
examples.zh: 快到9点半时，他由警察护送到达了。

examples.en: Fantasies cannot harm you, no matter how bizarre or far out they are.
examples.zh: 无论多么荒诞或怪异的幻想都伤害不到你。

examples.en: That seems so bizarre.
examples.zh: 看起来好奇怪。

examples.en: I lead a pretty mundane existence.
examples.zh: 我过着相当平淡的生活。

examples.en: Surely my existence cannot be so purposeless?
examples.zh: 想必，我的存在不可能如此毫无意义吧？

examples.en: We ascribe great importance to these policies.
examples.zh: 我们认为这些政策十分重要。

examples.en: We do not ascribe a superior wisdom to government or the state.
examples.zh: 我们并不将胜人一筹的智慧归属于政府或国家。

examples.en: He stepped across the threshold.
examples.zh: 他迈过门槛。

examples.en: She felt as though she was on the threshold of a new life.
examples.zh: 她觉得好像就要开始新生活了。

examples.en: Can you float on your back?
examples.zh: 你能仰浮吗？

examples.en: If it's made of wood it will float.
examples.zh: 这要是木材做的就能浮在水面上。

examples.en: Only a tiny minority hold such extreme views.
examples.zh: 只有极少数人持这样极端的观点。

examples.en: It was a salutary experience to be in the minority.
examples.zh: 做少数派是种磨练人的经历。

examples.en: The earth revolves on its axis.
examples.zh: 地球环绕自身的轴心转动。

examples.en: The third axis is the longitudinal axis.
examples.zh: 第三个轴是纵轴。

examples.en: The truck crashed into a telegraph pole.
examples.zh: 卡车撞上了电线杆。

examples.en: Five members of Scott's expedition made it to the South Pole.
examples.zh: 斯科特率领的探险队的五名成员一直来到了南极。

examples.en: Prevention of a problem is always preferable to trying to cure it.
examples.zh: 防止出现问题总是比试图解决问题更可取。

examples.en: State governments maintain that the voluntary contribution of funds through state lotteries is preferable to increase state sales or income taxes.
examples.zh: 各州政府坚持认为，通过销售彩票让居民自愿捐款以增加州内销售税或所得税的做法更可取。

examples.en: They publish reference books.
examples.zh: 他们出版参考书。

examples.en: The grid reference is C8.
examples.zh: 地图上的坐标方格数字为C8。

examples.en: In spite of great peril, I have survived.
examples.zh: 尽管危险巨大，我还是活了下来。

examples.en: Never had she met such spite and pettiness.
examples.zh: 她以前从来没有碰到过这样的恶意和狭隘。

examples.en: The jury found for the defendant.
examples.zh: 陪审团作出了对被告有利的裁决。

examples.en: The defendant pleaded guilty and was fined $500.
examples.zh: 被告认罪，并被罚款$500。

examples.en: Can I arrange an appointment for Monday?
examples.zh: 我可以安排星期一约见吗？

examples.en: I will arrange for someone to take you around.
examples.zh: 我会安排好人领你转转。

examples.en: She wore an olive-green T-shirt.
examples.zh: 她穿了一件橄榄绿的T恤衫。

examples.en: She speared an olive with her fork.
examples.zh: 她用叉子扎起一个橄榄。

examples.en: The man was brutish and coarse.
examples.zh: 这个人野蛮而粗俗。

examples.en: She spoke in a quiet voice but used remarkably coarse expressions.
examples.zh: 她说话声音很轻，但使用了非常粗俗的言辞。

examples.en: He tends to exaggerate the difficulties.
examples.zh: 他往往夸大困难。

examples.en: These figures exaggerate the loss of competitiveness.
examples.zh: 这些数字夸大了竞争力的下降。

examples.en: They're making efforts to streamline their normally cumbersome bureaucracy.
examples.zh: 他们正努力提高其通常臃肿的官僚机构的效率。

examples.en: Huxley speculated that a coat of hair would insulate against loss of body heat and might streamline the body to reduce drag in flight.
examples.zh: 赫胥黎推测，一层毛发可以隔离身体热量的流失，并可能使身体呈现流线型，以减少飞行中的阻力。

examples.en: How dare she imply that I was lying?
examples.zh: 她竟敢暗示我在撒谎？

examples.en: What does the woman imply?
examples.zh: 这位女士在暗示什么？

examples.en: The decline in marriage has been offset by a rise in cohabitation.
examples.zh: 同居人数的增加跟结婚人数的减少相抵消。

examples.en: Prices have risen in order to offset the increased cost of materials.
examples.zh: 为补偿原料成本的增加而提高了价格。

examples.en: We made a commitment to keep working together.
examples.zh: 我们作了承诺要继续在一起工作。

examples.en: Will the president be able to hold to this commitment?
examples.zh: 总统能恪守这一承诺吗？

examples.en: What is most noticeable is this cavity, this fluid-filled cavity that begins to develop.
examples.zh: 最明显的是这个腔，这个充满液体的腔开始发育。

examples.en: In contrast to cavity QED systems, the researchers can custom tailor the circuitry in many areas.
examples.zh: 与腔 QED 系统相比，研究人员可以在许多领域定制电路。

examples.en: You coward! What are you afraid of?
examples.zh: 你这胆小鬼！你怕什么呢？

examples.en: 'Coward!' a tiny inner voice insisted.
examples.zh: “胆小鬼！”内心一个小声音坚持说。

examples.en: Burning fossil fuels uses oxygen and produces carbon dioxide.
examples.zh: 燃烧化石燃料消耗氧气并产生二氧化碳。

examples.en: On a global scale, 77% of energy is created from fossil fuels.
examples.zh: 全球77%的能量产生自化石燃料。

examples.en: He gave me a poke in the ribs to wake me up.
examples.zh: 他捅了一下我的肋部把我叫醒。

examples.en: John smiled at them and gave Richard a playful poke.
examples.zh: 约翰冲他们笑了笑，还顽皮地捅了理查德一下。

examples.en: Jane still nurses the pain of rejection.
examples.zh: 简依然怀着被拒绝的痛苦。

examples.en: These feelings of rejection and hurt remain.
examples.zh: 这些遭到拒绝和伤害的感觉仍然存在。

examples.en: It is easy to change a light bulb, sure, but it is harder to change the bulb and its fixture.
examples.zh: 换一个灯泡当然很容易，但是要更换灯泡和其固定装置就比较难了。

examples.en: The lamp, the fixture, and the room, all three must work in concert for the true benefits of end-users.
examples.zh: 灯、固定装置和房间，三者必须协同工作，才能真正造福最终用户。

examples.en: They manufacture the class of plastics known as thermoplastic materials.
examples.zh: 他们生产被称为热塑材料的塑料类制品。

examples.en: Coca-Cola, Pepsi and Cadbury use franchisers to manufacture, bottle and distribute their products within geographical areas.
examples.zh: 可口可乐、百事可乐和吉百利公司利用特许经销商在一定的地区内生产、罐装和销售其产品。

examples.en: He said it was true that a collision had happened.
examples.zh: 他说碰撞真的发生了一次。

examples.en: Their car was in a head-on collision with a truck.
examples.zh: 他们的车同一辆卡车迎面相撞。

examples.en: These pages are out of sequence.
examples.zh: 这几页排错了次序。

examples.en: The tasks had to be performed in a particular sequence.
examples.zh: 这些任务必须按一定次序去执行。

examples.en: He is hoping to recruit a chairman from outside the company.
examples.zh: 他在希望从公司之外招聘一位董事长。

examples.en: The police are trying to recruit more black and Hispanic officers.
examples.zh: 警方正试图招收更多的黑人和西班牙裔的警官。

examples.en: There is a lack of adequate provision for disabled students.
examples.zh: 为残疾学生提供的服务不够。

examples.en: The government is responsible for the provision of health care.
examples.zh: 政府负责提供医疗服务。

examples.en: Reduced-calorie cheese is a great substitute for cream cheese.
examples.zh: 低卡路里干酪是奶油干酪的极好替代品。

examples.en: A glass or two of wine will not significantly add to the calorie count.
examples.zh: 一两杯酒不会显著增加卡路里的数量。

examples.en: The Republicans tried to trump this with their slogan.
examples.zh: 共和党人试图用他们的口号来胜出。

examples.en: The ceremony was disrupted by unprecedented heckling and slogan-chanting.
examples.zh: 典礼因前所未有的起哄和口号声而中断。

examples.en: This is not invariably the case.
examples.zh: 事情并非总是如此。

examples.en: They almost invariably get it wrong.
examples.zh: 他们几乎总是将它弄错。

examples.en: We commence building next week.
examples.zh: 我们下周破土动工。

examples.en: The meeting is scheduled to commence at noon.
examples.zh: 会议定于午间召开。

examples.en: Foods are broken down in the digestive tract.
examples.zh: 食物在消化道内被分解。

examples.en: A vast tract of land is ready for development.
examples.zh: 一大片土地正待开发。

examples.en: Prices range from $119 to $199, depending on the particular configuration.
examples.zh: 价格根据配置的不同从119美元到199美元不等。

examples.en: The precise configuration of a heat island depends on several factors.
examples.zh: 热岛的精确结构取决于几个因素。

examples.en: What's the chemical symbol for mercury?
examples.zh: 水银的化学符号是什么？

examples.en: The company had committed thousands of dollars for a plan to reduce mercury emissions.
examples.zh: 该公司已经为了一项减少汞排放的计划调拨了数千美元。

examples.en: She's a frequent visitor to the US.
examples.zh: 她经常去美国。

examples.en: She is a frequent traveller to Belgium.
examples.zh: 她经常到比利时去旅行。

examples.en: Chester Cheetah chews a chunk of cheep cheddar cheese.
examples.zh: 切斯特猎豹嚼着一大块切达干酪。

examples.en: The next time you see a chunk of seaweed … notice the beauty of it.
examples.zh: 下次你看到一大块海草……注意它的美。

examples.en: You have to understand how cells interact.
examples.zh: 你必须得了解细胞之间是如何相互作用的。

examples.en: They learn how to interact with their peers.
examples.zh: 他们学习如何与同龄人互动。

examples.en: Simpson's much vaunted discoveries are in fact commonplace in modern sociology.
examples.zh: 辛普森的那些被过分称赞的发现在现代社会学中实际上是老生常谈。

examples.en: Be not content with the commonplace in character.
examples.zh: 不要满足于普通的共性。

examples.en: The surface of poured concrete may vary according to its finish and aggregate.
examples.zh: 灌浇混凝土的表面依照其抛光和混凝料的不同而变化。

examples.en: They won 4–2 on aggregate.
examples.zh: 他们以总分4:2获胜。

examples.en: She was rich, beautiful and seemingly ageless.
examples.zh: 她富有漂亮，而且看起来永不显老。

examples.en: A seemingly endless line of trucks waits in vain to load up.
examples.zh: 看上去没有尽头的一排卡车徒劳地等着装货。

examples.en: The attendant showed us to our seats.
examples.zh: 服务员把我们带到我们的座位。

examples.en: Tony Williams was working as a car park attendant in Los Angeles.
examples.zh: 托尼·威廉斯当时在洛杉矶的一个停车场做服务生。

examples.en: I was constantly ill, with a baffling array of symptoms.
examples.zh: 我不断地生病，还伴有一大堆莫名其妙的症状。

examples.en: I was confronted with an array of knobs, levers, and switches.
examples.zh: 我面对着一排旋钮、控制杆和开关。

examples.en: If you have enough RAM, set the value of this parameter as large as possible to decrease the indexing time dramatically.
examples.zh: 如果你有足够的内存，请将该参数的值设置得尽可能大以显著减少索引时间。

examples.en: If this were more than a demo, some other logic would choose the parameter, perhaps prompting the user to supply the information.
examples.zh: 如果这不仅仅是一个演示的话，某些其他的逻辑将选择参数，可能会提示用户提供该信息。

examples.en: Herbalism had become an all but extinct skill in the Western world.
examples.zh: 草药医术在西方世界几乎已成了一项绝迹的技术。

examples.en: The idea of cloning extinct life forms still belongs to science fiction.
examples.zh: 对绝种的生命形式进行克隆的想法仍然属于科学幻想。

examples.en: When do babies learn to discriminate voices?
examples.zh: 婴儿什么时候学会辨别嗓音呢？

examples.en: Employers cannot discriminate on grounds of age.
examples.zh: 雇主不得有年龄歧视。

examples.en: Jays prefer crickets, but crickets degrade more quickly.
examples.zh: 松鸡喜欢蟋蟀，但蟋蟀退化得更快。

examples.en: Certain irrigation practices degrade soil quality and reduce agricultural productivity.
examples.zh: 某些灌溉措施会降低土壤质量，降低农业生产力。

examples.en: You can always use opaque glass if you need to block a street view.
examples.zh: 如果你需要挡住外面的街景，你随时可以使用不透明玻璃。

examples.en: The clusters diffracted light, making the solution opaque.
examples.zh: 这团物质衍射光簇，产生了不透明的溶液。

examples.en: I'll repay the money I owe them next week.
examples.zh: 我将在下个星期偿还欠他们的钱。

examples.en: I can never repay your many kindnesses to me.
examples.zh: 我无法报答你对我无微不至的关怀。

examples.en: Europe's monetary system is falling apart.
examples.zh: 欧洲的货币体制正在瓦解。

examples.en: Some countries tighten monetary policy to avoid inflation.
examples.zh: 一些国家紧缩货币政策以避免通货膨胀。

examples.en: There were flowers on the grave.
examples.zh: 坟上有些花。

examples.en: Relatives laid wreaths on the grave.
examples.zh: 死者亲属在墓前献了花圈。

examples.en: His height gives him a clear advantage.
examples.zh: 他的身高使他具有明显的优势。

examples.en: Being tall gave Tony a distinct advantage.
examples.zh: 托尼个子高是个明显的优势。

examples.en: He is no stranger to controversy.
examples.zh: 他对争论见得多了。

examples.en: The issue engendered controversy.
examples.zh: 这个问题引起了争论。

examples.en: Begin when I give the command.
examples.zh: 我发出命令时开始。

examples.en: I closed my eyes at his command.
examples.zh: 我听从他的命令闭上了眼睛。

examples.en: There is a compulsory course in statistics.
examples.zh: 有一门统计学的必修课。

examples.en: Certain courses are compulsory, others are optional.
examples.zh: 某些课程是必修的，其他是选修的。

examples.en: Her performance was mesmerizing.
examples.zh: 她的表演让人入迷。

examples.en: Her performance displayed great art.
examples.zh: 她的表演展现了精湛的技艺。

examples.en: Currency notes bear serial Numbers.
examples.zh: 钞票上有连续的号码。

examples.en: The Mi-26 is the largest in the world serial Soviet transport helicopter.
examples.zh: 米-26 是世界上最大的前苏联系列运输直升机。

examples.en: We anticipate that sales will rise next year.
examples.zh: 我们预料明年销售量将会增加。

examples.en: They anticipate moving to bigger premises by the end of the year.
examples.zh: 他们预期年底前迁入较大的经营场址。

examples.en: The skis should detach from the boot if you fall.
examples.zh: 要是你跌倒了，滑雪板就该脱离靴子。

examples.en: I tried to detach myself from the reality of these terrible events.
examples.zh: 我尽力使自己从这些可怕事件的现实中摆脱出来。

examples.en: The mayor will have to slash the city's already bare-bones budget.
examples.zh: 市长将不得不削减该市已经降到最低限度的预算。

examples.en: He's just nipped out to have a slash.
examples.zh: 他刚才急急忙忙跑出去撒尿了。

examples.en: It angers me that people would fabricate a story like that.
examples.zh: 人们编造这样的谎话让我感到愤怒。

examples.en: David, on the other hand, had labored to fabricate a curious patent leather trouser suit.
examples.zh: 另一方面，大卫努力制作了一套奇特的、别出心裁的皮革裤套装。

examples.en: Grodin is a fine comic actor.
examples.zh: 格罗丁是一位好的滑稽演员。

examples.en: The play is both comic and tragic.
examples.zh: 这部剧既滑稽又悲惨。

examples.en: His quest for perfection is relentless.
examples.zh: 他对完美的追求是不懈的。

examples.en: The novel achieves a perfection of form that is quite new.
examples.zh: 小说的形式新颖完美。

examples.en: The description was pretty vague.
examples.zh: 这项描述是相当含糊的。

examples.en: The charges were vague and imprecise.
examples.zh: 这些指控的内容模糊不清。

examples.en: The Pope was speaking ex cathedra.
examples.zh: 教皇以宗座权威正式宣言。

examples.en: The Pope has anointed him as Archbishop.
examples.zh: 教皇给他施以膏油，以示他成为大主教。

examples.en: There is one exception to this general principle.
examples.zh: 这个一般性原则有一例外。

examples.en: No one could possibly take exception to his comments.
examples.zh: 任何人都不可能对他的意见提出异议。

examples.en: Superman's alter ego was Clark Kent.
examples.zh: 超人的第二自我是克拉克•肯特。

examples.en: He has the biggest ego of anyone I've ever met.
examples.zh: 他是我所见的最自负的人。

examples.en: He denounces people who urge him to alter his ways.
examples.zh: 他指责那些敦促他改变习惯的人们。

examples.en: He continued to urge the Republican Party to tilt rightward.
examples.zh: 他继续力劝共和党右倾。

examples.en: You, or your spouse, must be at least 60 to participate.
examples.zh: 你或你的配偶至少要有60岁才能加入。

examples.en: It is often helpful to have your spouse in the room when major news is expected.
examples.zh: 在等待重大消息时，让你的配偶在场往往是很有好处的。

examples.en: I'll text you the final score.
examples.zh: 我会发短信告诉你最终的比分。

examples.en: It's my best ever score.
examples.zh: 这是我得到过的最好分数。

examples.en: Loch Coruisk on the Isle of Skye, in Scotland, which can only be reached by boat or by foot, completed the top 10.
examples.zh: 排在前十名的还有位于苏格兰斯凯岛的科斯克湖，人们只能乘船或步行前往。

examples.en: At a recent festival of pop-music in the Isle of Wight, crowds of teenagers flocked to listen to their favorite singers and musicians.
examples.zh: 在怀特岛最近举行的流行音乐节上，成群结队的青少年聚集在一起，聆听他们最喜欢的歌手和音乐家演唱。

examples.en: Within those precincts, within that enclosure, there's a large, open courtyard.
examples.zh: 在这些区域内，在围墙内，有一个大的、开放的庭院。

examples.en: Without this enclosure, but just within the street entrance, sat a grey-haired gentleman at a small table, with a large open ledger of some kind before him.
examples.zh: 没有围墙，就在街口，一位白发苍苍的绅士坐在一张小桌旁，面前摆着一本打开的大账本。

examples.en: After all his hard work, he now needs only two credit hours to graduate.
examples.zh: 通过努力学习，他现在只需再修两个学分就可以毕业了。

examples.en: The Voyager workload is divided among 157 scientists and scads of graduate students.
examples.zh: 航行者的工作量被分给157位科学家和大批研究生。

examples.en: The famine threatened to depopulate the continent.
examples.zh: 饥荒威胁着该大陆人口数量。

examples.en: If the drought continues there's going to be a famine.
examples.zh: 如果旱灾继续下去很可能要发生饥荒。

examples.en: I'm going home now—I've done my quota of work for the day.
examples.zh: 我现在要回家了—我已完成了今天的工作指标。

examples.en: The quota of four tickets per person had been reduced to two.
examples.zh: 每人4张票的限额已减少到了2张。

examples.en: The decision was not unanimous.
examples.zh: 这项决定没有得到一致通过。

examples.en: The vote was unanimous.
examples.zh: 表决一致通过。

examples.en: Researchers greeted the proposal with scorn.
examples.zh: 研究者们对这个提议报以轻蔑的态度。

examples.en: Her fellow teachers greeted her proposal with scorn.
examples.zh: 别的老师对她的提议不屑一顾。

examples.en: He was found by a police helicopter using thermal imaging equipment.
examples.zh: 他被一架警用直升飞机用热成像设备找到了。

examples.en: Rescue teams are using thermal imaging to locate survivors of the earthquake.
examples.zh: 救援队伍正利用热成像确定地震幸存者的位置。

examples.en: After the fragments' entry, these analyses revealed unprecedented traces of sulfur.
examples.zh: 在碎片进入之后，这些分析揭示了前所未有的硫磺痕迹。

examples.en: The level of sulfur dioxide gas above Venus's clouds shows large and very frequent fluctuations.
examples.zh: 金星云层上方的二氧化硫气体水平显示出巨大且非常频繁的波动。

examples.en: We work on improving visual acuity.
examples.zh: 我们致力于提高视觉敏锐度。

examples.en: He has a visual impairment in the right eye.
examples.zh: 他的右眼有视力损伤。

examples.en: The terrain changed quickly from arable land to desert.
examples.zh: 这里的地形很快由耕地变为沙漠。

examples.en: The enemy would always have the advantage of familiarity with the rugged terrain.
examples.zh: 敌人会一直在对崎岖地形的熟悉上占有优势。

examples.en: For months he was prostrated with grief.
examples.zh: 他好几个月都悲痛不已。

examples.en: Julia's soft heart was touched by his grief.
examples.zh: 朱莉娅心肠软，见他悲伤动了恻隐之心。

examples.en: They rap about life in the inner city.
examples.zh: 他们演唱了有关市区生活的说唱乐。

examples.en: Her favourite music was by Run DMC, a rap group.
examples.zh: 她最喜欢的音乐是一个说唱音乐组合的音乐。

examples.en: How do we know when to invest in an upgrade?
examples.zh: 我们如何知道何时投资升级？

examples.en: People should upgrade their devices regularly.
examples.zh: 人们应该定期升级他们的设备。

examples.en: You can instruct your bank to allow a third party to remove money from your account.
examples.zh: 你可以通知银行，允许第三方从你的账户取款。

examples.en: Does it corrupt or instruct our children?
examples.zh: 那它会使我们的孩子堕落，还是会教导他们呢？

examples.en: Full details are given in Appendix 3.
examples.zh: 详情见附录3。

examples.en: We are not certain whether the appendix had already burst or not.
examples.zh: 我们不能确定阑尾破了没有。

examples.en: He virtually admitted he was guilty.
examples.zh: 他实际上已承认自己有罪。

examples.en: This new material is virtually unbreakable.
examples.zh: 这种新材料实际上是不碎的。

examples.en: He seemed extremely agreeable.
examples.zh: 他似乎特别招人喜欢。

examples.en: We spent a most agreeable day together.
examples.zh: 我们在一起度过了非常愉快的一天。

examples.en: China's economy galloped ahead.
examples.zh: 中国的经济飞速向前发展。

examples.en: The economy continues to grow.
examples.zh: 经济持续增长。

examples.en: The sense of community is lost.
examples.zh: 团体意识没有了。

examples.en: The centre will serve the whole community.
examples.zh: 这个中心将为整个社区提供服务。

examples.en: Could you fax me the latest version?
examples.zh: 你可不可以把最新版本传真给我？

examples.en: The original version featured a guitar solo.
examples.zh: 原版以吉他独奏为特色。

examples.en: Sprinkle onion and cheese in the pie plate.
examples.zh: 把洋葱和干酪撒在饼盘中。

examples.en: You can sprinkle shallots and tomatoes on the surface as you like.
examples.zh: 你可以随喜好在表面撒上青葱和番茄。

examples.en: Her hair shone bronze and gold.
examples.zh: 她的头发闪耀着青铜色和金黄色的光彩。

examples.en: He won three golds and a bronze.
examples.zh: 他获得三枚金牌和一枚铜牌。

examples.en: My conception of a garden was based on gardens I had visited in England.
examples.zh: 我对花园的概念是基于我在英格兰参观过的一些花园的。

examples.en: The plan was brilliant in its conception but failed because of lack of money.
examples.zh: 尽管这计划构想绝妙，但终因资金不足而告流产。

examples.en: The municipal authorities gave the go-ahead for the march.
examples.zh: 市政当局批准了此次游行。

examples.en: The municipal authorities here are preparing for food rationing.
examples.zh: 此地的市政当局正为食物配给制做准备。

examples.en: He caught her arm in a subconscious attempt to detain her.
examples.zh: 他下意识地抓住了她的胳膊，试图留住她。

examples.en: Millson stood up. "Thank you. We won't detain you any further, Mrs. Stebbing."
examples.zh: 米尔森站起来。“谢谢您。我们不再耽搁您了，斯特宾太太。”

examples.en: Mr. Lin is associate director of the Institute.
examples.zh: 林先生是该研究所的副主任。

examples.en: He got a scholarship to the Pratt Institute of Art.
examples.zh: 他得到了一笔普拉特艺术学院的奖学金。

examples.en: He can't endure being defeated.
examples.zh: 他无法忍受失败。

examples.en: She could not endure the thought of parting.
examples.zh: 一想到分别她就无法忍受。

examples.en: The proposals were short on detail.
examples.zh: 这些提议缺少细节。

examples.en: I can't remember every little detail.
examples.zh: 我记不住每一个微小的细节。

examples.en: PGC from genital ridge and mesenterium of human embryo was incubated on fibroblast feeder layers for subculture.
examples.zh: 从人胚胎生殖嵴、肠系膜中消化分离的原始生殖细胞，将其接种在人子宫内膜成纤维细胞饲养层上传代培养。

examples.en: Websites devoted to the phones are appearing and have become a genuine subculture.
examples.zh: 为山寨机设立的网站不断出现，成为一种真正的亚文化现象。

examples.en: The appropriate word eluded him.
examples.zh: 他想不起来那个合适的词。

examples.en: Jeans are not appropriate for a formal party.
examples.zh: 正式聚会上穿牛仔裤不合适。

examples.en: The main criterion is value for money.
examples.zh: 主要的标准是钱要用得划算。

examples.en: The most important criterion for entry is that applicants must design and make their own work.
examples.zh: 参加的最重要标准就是申请人必须设计并制作自己的作品。

examples.en: The essence of dialectical thought is division.
examples.zh: 辩证思想的实质是二分法。

examples.en: Though complicated in detail, local taxes are in essence simple.
examples.zh: 虽然细节复杂，地方税本质上是简单的。

examples.en: What happens depends on pore size.
examples.zh: 所发生的一切取决于孔隙大小。

examples.en: This pore space is known as porosity and is expressed as a percentage of the total rock volume.
examples.zh: 这个孔隙空间被称为孔隙度，用岩石总体积的百分比表示。

examples.en: We can greatly enhance the utility of green space through designs that provide a range of different uses in a confined space.
examples.zh: 我们可以通过在有限的空间中提供多种不同用途的设计，大大提高绿色空间的实用性。
